name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: Watch this great Interview with Joshua Scott
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i.CrnrvJg2fBCP.&b=VGkwcA3jiMCwTN6JMBbY0g

Peter

In case you missed it, here is a link to yesterday's live interview with Hyderabad-based S Cube TV. We spent almost an hour covering my platform, my background, and my views regarding the ongoing current events of 2020. We are getting great reviews, and if you are interested in hearing from a proud America First Conservative leader who is not afraid to stand up to the mainstream narrative, then you should definitely check this out!

Discussion with Joshua Scott | Candidate for Congress | California - Republican Party | S Cube TV

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i.CrnrvJg2fBCP.&b=un1XKVqhkvkazsSGRTGSwg

Video

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=i.CrnrvJg2fBCP.&b=un1XKVqhkvkazsSGRTGSwg

I hope you are doing well and had a great 4th of July, despite nonsensical California policies that hindered one of the best days of the year. Regardless, I am still proud as ever to be a citizen of the greatest country on Earth. The future is bright, and as long as we stay focused and stand for the truth, all will be well. I promise!

Stay in touch. Join our movement. Stand up for your country. And chip in a few bucks if you can. Talk soon!

Joshua Scott

www.votejoshuascott.org

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Did you see the new poll results?
body:

body:
I have been warning you about the danger of cancel culture and the woke mob that is tearing down statues and defacing monuments. I have been warning you about the danger of cancel culture and the woke mob that is tearing down statues and defacing monuments.

Cancel culture is the idea that liberals should never have to hear from conservatives and that we should only use politically correct, mob-approved words. If the Left can control what we say, they can control how we can think. And the ultimate goal of the Left is just that—control.

One organization that has embarrassed itself over political correctness is the NBA. The NBA attacked a coach for supporting human rights in Hong Kong and now the NBA announced players will be allowed to display certain phrases on their jerseys.

Take a look at the list:These words and phrases have been cleared by the politically correct crowd and look like they are straight from a New York Times social justice seminar.

But I think they’re missing some key phrases. Do you agree? If so, click here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5MDc2NzYS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDYzMzc2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 and take my poll on what the NBA should have included.
Which of these phrases do you think the NBA should add? ✔️ Back the Blue

✔️ Stop China’s Concentration Camps

✔️ America is the greatest country on earth

Take the Poll http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI5MDc2NzYS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMDYzMzc2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Cancel culture is not progress—it's mob rule and madness.

I am not afraid to speak out against these radicals and their ridiculous demands. I’ll continue to do so and appreciate your support.

In service,Tom Cotton

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: re: our favorite ice cream places in Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Now that our restaurants are reopening, let’s support them in a safe and healthy way. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6c610d322dc34f60bada12f5116aa5e8&_e=G26FWu56EB3aSVT_O7f5pI2eHw2QbrqRJM-b8n-gqaWKoNhBnJfZqeiM4n0InE8xp1Z5d5qsR0Dm561hgjjyUsBc4g1ClpY3eQiBW9ELbNZa9a0BsFQEt_FCm5J3RBGfgQY0DDTTmQZiO7EEI9McXyJGPypZlW3QWQPjwSYPVRyYuxRME0kcOyKtYKKfHxyvIyphI5GyCLNgtggMLH0Itgn2mOXLsxZSkfQwchvuOA_YDOD95yQ12W1FzyFrtktivMiOaQMjlp8M-uWoWcEI4KVuXbkE9JgXZ34hUfe1Act2FUFS4aK30kLK644tQb6IzvakxQ6oykzJlrwhcKvaYQf4o71yYPs9qbe4qZDVKfTgv12sgoli9DG5CNVTDPpgDUnGhLMtMrwE5vH6JZZDbGp7nxoeeHeUfcCsOSqx-YYjyiylTRDg6GtlDjwXrP5_N5b0Ta3-hHwTb-btr7FBvBetbDfIcSCDnT35uC4wOEs%3D) Friend, Indiana is getting back on track, and businesses are reopening -- including restaurants across the state!
**The COVID-19 pandemic has hit our restaurant industry especially hard. Now that our restaurants are reopening, we’re all excited to get out and support them in a safe and healthy way.** For this week’s One Indiana, we thought we’d share some ideas about where to start, so we had our crew pull together Eric’s favorite ice cream places in Indiana (yum!). These are all time-tested favorites --_no matter your preferred flavor!_
Remember - as you start to patronize your favorite restaurants and local businesses, be sure to check the **[Indiana State Department of Health website](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=6c610d322dc34f60bada12f5116aa5e8&_e=G26FWu56EB3aSVT_O7f5pPsucXvb5YbwFTGmqwM1CQlQs_EQQ6Hj2PXz-RtEtLkme63zza_0ePng_SxB3Sfqt-PoPK3NsmtcBbs3vnx1WzOSBAIrP4x8Szcc6doYkHsXNAh8yP6hASqn9LvyJse4OXXPPRke8b07vm_j6CLorjQwW2aJ2mNIYfvO2yKQ6VAv7JnoEJQeL7u8_t6hojA9e2Hgu4h7sEb4GKf6Z3EH_QiztNs-8PjT-fXhg0AnYLxX8opuCO7DTXFluO9NPe1V1xKTivMH1Gi0xEKMS4IROFNj-3mpj2NKUsWkB0uH818wokCnvdEtY914DHxJwiHr4ylxO0L3dCIntM1ae339ovjHuxs7hN_lFD2WZ2bc7VrsJqzo7W2alaHsTNPnd2my1j3lUKCXfhO0c0tfC-Bq5s185jXNfhS8ovdQeyB45XqkKFkT2WZciPBJ5YJg6cQ0vg%3D%3D)**. clean_body: Now that our restaurants are reopening, let’s support them in a safe and healthy way. Friend, Indiana is getting back on track, and businesses are reopening -- including restaurants across the state! The COVID-19 pandemic has hit our restaurant industry especially hard. Now that our restaurants are reopening, we’re all excited to get out and support them in a safe and healthy way. For this week’s One Indiana, we thought we’d share some ideas about where to start, so we had our crew pull together Eric’s favorite ice cream places in Indiana (yum!). These are all time-tested favorites --no matter your preferred flavor! Remember - as you start to patronize your favorite restaurants and local businesses, be sure to check the . Local leaders and the businesses in your community might have additional requirements, too, so be sure to check with them, and please follow all guidelines. Check it out -- but warning, you may get hungry! \- 100 different milkshakes. 100 different sundaes. Need we say more? \- This organic farm and award-winning creamery is a great way to cool off in the summer heat! Stop by and grab some dessert at their Dairy Bar. \- This old fashioned ice cream parlor is one of our crew’s favorites and an Indiana tradition since 1900. \- Travel back in time at this drive-in restaurant and get your sundae delivered by a car hop! \- A classic spot to stop for top-notch burgers and ice cream on a summer day! \- The Dairy Bar is sadly closed this year because of COVID but we’ll make up for lost time... and lost ice cream cones... next year. \- What does LICS stand for? Lloyd’s Ice Cream Shoppes, of course. Serving premium ice cream to Hoosiers since 1950. \- You need to stop by and try one of their 36 amazing flavors of hand-dipped ice cream. \- Locally owned and operated for more than 50 years, many Fort Wayne residents consider their opening the first sign of spring. \- Located in the historic Monon Railway Station and owned by life-long Indianapolis residents, this is a must for Indy residents. \- Fair Oaks is a great outdoor escape and the number one agritourism destination in the Midwest! Take a visit, grab a cone, and reconnect with nature! \- Jimmie’s is an Indiana staple, and also home to some pretty amazing barbeque. Check it out if you’re near Pendleton! \- The Cone Palace certainly has our crew’s endorsement — it’s one of Eric’s favorite places to eat in the whole world and a must-try. \- They’ve been serving Hoosiers daily made ice cream since 1945. Come and see why they claim to be recognized as the number one ice cream in the world! ** \- Dairy Sweet has been open for more than 70 years. You need to stop by and try out one of their 13 delicious flavors of soft serve. Thanks for reading our list! No matter where you’re going, let’s support our Hoosier small businesses. Did we miss your favorite ice cream place in Indiana? Let us know using the comment box below! Thanks for reading — we’ll be in touch soon. -Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. name: Steve Chabot
subject: The REAL Threat
body:
their lives matter too... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The REAL Threat](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-j/)
There is no doubt that George Floyd and his family deserve justice for his senseless death. Nevertheless, this past weekend was particularly violent in our nation's urban areas. Case in point, in Chicago there were 77 shootings and 17 deaths. None of these victims was shot by a policeman. And there were no protesters in the street. No statues were torn down. No autonomous zones were set up. And the press mostly ignored it. In this week's blog, I discuss this alarming trend in our cities (Cincinnati included) and answer the question - do these victims lives matter too? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Chief Justice Roberts Disappoints Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-d/)
This past week, Chief Justice John Roberts joined the other liberal Supreme Court judges to strike down a Louisiana pro-life law that required abortionists to have admitting privileges in a nearby hospital - another disappointing decision from a Republican appointed Justice. In this week's blog, I discuss the phenomenon of conservative judges trending left. Why do we never see liberal judges going to the right? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Police Reform](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-u/)
Last week, the House Judiciary Committee, which I'm a member, discussed the turmoil in Seattle and the aftermath of the George Floyd killing during our markup on impending police reform legislation. I wanted to use this week's blog to discuss some progress being made on police reform and to give you insight into what I think still needs to be accomplished. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Mob Rule](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkijhyht-kujkulhluu-n/)
Mob rule has taken over a major American city. In Seattle, a group of anarchists have taken a police precinct and a considerable portion of the city hostage. In this week's blog, I discuss this radical group's shocking demands which include abolition of the police, courts, and jails, free college, free healthcare, and free housing. How have Seattle's leaders responded to this mob? Will Rule of Law prevail or will this spread to other cities? clean_body: their lives matter too... No images? There is no doubt that George Floyd and his family deserve justice for his senseless death. Nevertheless, this past weekend was particularly violent in our nation's urban areas. Case in point, in Chicago there were 77 shootings and 17 deaths. None of these victims was shot by a policeman. And there were no protesters in the street. No statues were torn down. No autonomous zones were set up. And the press mostly ignored it. In this week's blog, I discuss this alarming trend in our cities (Cincinnati included) and answer the question - do these victims lives matter too? Previous Blog Posts This past week, Chief Justice John Roberts joined the other liberal Supreme Court judges to strike down a Louisiana pro-life law that required abortionists to have admitting privileges in a nearby hospital - another disappointing decision from a Republican appointed Justice. In this week's blog, I discuss the phenomenon of conservative judges trending left. Why do we never see liberal judges going to the right? Last week, the House Judiciary Committee, which I'm a member, discussed the turmoil in Seattle and the aftermath of the George Floyd killing during our markup on impending police reform legislation. I wanted to use this week's blog to discuss some progress being made on police reform and to give you insight into what I think still needs to be accomplished. Mob rule has taken over a major American city. In Seattle, a group of anarchists have taken a police precinct and a considerable portion of the city hostage. In this week's blog, I discuss this radical group's shocking demands which include abolition of the police, courts, and jails, free college, free healthcare, and free housing. How have Seattle's leaders responded to this mob? Will Rule of Law prevail or will this spread to other cities? | | | ---|---|--- Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf1a/1cd0ac28/887ef6a2/357cf82a/186614873/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf1a/1cd0ac28/887ef6a2/357cf828/186614873/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf1a/1cd0ac28/887ef6a2/357cf827/186614873/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf1a/1cd0ac28/887ef6a2/357cf826/186614873/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf1a/1cd0ac28/887ef6a2/357cf829/186614873/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf1a/1cd0ac28/887ef6a2/357cf825/186614873/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf1a/1cd0ac28/887ef6a2/357cf828/186614873/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf1a/1cd0ac28/887ef6a2/357cf824/186614873/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Biggest upset of 2020?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
We knew we were surging but this is incredible - and it’s not the only piece of good news in this poll.
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkittjut-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Peter, With less than a month away from Election Day, an internal poll shows our campaign in a statistical dead heat with the establishment’s hand picked candidate, Bill Hagerty. We are surging at the exact right time. _LATEST POLL RESULTS_ | Bill Hagerty | 33%
---|---
**Dr. Manny Sethi** | **31%**
George Flinn | 6%
Unsure / Undecided | 31%
We can’t let up now. We have moved over 20 points in the polls this past month. Voters are responding to our conservative message of standing up to the left wing mobs and defending America.
Peter, there are still people out there who are DEFINITELY going to vote in our primary next month whom we haven’t reached yet. We know we have a winning message: Tennesseans want a conservative outsider, someone who is not a part of the same old political class, someone who will take on the mobs and the radical Left and defend this country.

* * *
---
Dear Friend, Only two days left. Early voting ends tomorrow night - then it's on to election day! The data team gives me an update every day, and so far, turnout looks almost exactly as we expected it to. In Brazos County the under-25 vote stands at 9.5% of the total turnout - almost three times as high as any other county. Makes me even more thankful for the endorsement from the Young Dems BCS! The last day of early voting usually sees an uptick in activity, and of course election day can be very busy. So, if you want to beat the crowd get out there today if you can. Thank you, and as always - stay safe and protect those around you! Rick
| Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
---

name: Betsy Rader
subject: What your dollars do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
_**Where does the money go? **_ You get plenty of fundraising emails from me and other candidates and I'm sure you've wondered what your donation buys. _Believe me_ \- each grassroots dollar we raise makes a real impact and gets us one step closer to flipping this seat in November. From the staff who supervise our volunteers to the digital ads reaching voters through social media, every penny is carefully budgeted. This year, the money we raise is even more important than usual in reaching voters. Because Republican elected leaders disregarded healthcare experts by discouraging masks and opening up our state too early, it seems unlikely that in-person events and canvassing are going to be able to start up as we had hoped. Without door-to-door or in-person events, we have to spend more money on paid advertising to reach voters, and of course Republicans have the advantage with dark money & corporate PACs funding their campaigns. **We can 't let the Republicans' poor handling of the pandemic work to their advantage by keeping us from communicating with voters. We need your support.** Here are some of the key ways your contribution works:
* **[$50 donation](https://act.myngp.com/el/aTaOBCW24iNfU8JkHS3R-6gGOqheDvwNrMgG5ZBXrcg=/yf6EULTofbFQj9G4GMQyg1Tr3gTQnCpdhqQyTLxpiVk=?refcode=7.9&amount=50): **Covers the cost of a package of postcards that are mailed to voters in the district
* **[$100 donation](https://act.myngp.com/el/aTaOBCW24iNfU8JkHS3R-6gGOqheDvwNrMgG5ZBXrcg=/yf6EULTofbFQj9G4GMQyg1Tr3gTQnCpdhqQyTLxpiVk=?refcode=7.9&amount=100): **Boosts our digital ad program on social media to reach 250 more people
* **[$250 donation](https://act.myngp.com/el/aTaOBCW24iNfU8JkHS3R-6gGOqheDvwNrMgG5ZBXrcg=/yf6EULTofbFQj9G4GMQyg1Tr3gTQnCpdhqQyTLxpiVk=?refcode=7.9&amount=250): **Reaches 10 more potential voters for our polling

If you can chip in at one of these levels, or whatever level is best for you, I assure you it will make a difference to Ohio's future. Thanks so much. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aTaOBCW24iNfU8JkHS3R-6gGOqheDvwNrMgG5ZBXrcg=/yf6EULTofbFQj9G4GMQyg1Tr3gTQnCpdhqQyTLxpiVk=?refcode=7.9) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aTaOBCW24iNfU8JkHS3R-6gGOqheDvwNrMgG5ZBXrcg=/_m-DPma5gypcaGj1WI5-0KkeiQnG_LrTdjft_Xw8t7c=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aTaOBCW24iNfU8JkHS3R-6gGOqheDvwNrMgG5ZBXrcg=/afVktaTsD-AgSN4ZyCC1St5DW4gKijRun6kKiaDLGBg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aTaOBCW24iNfU8JkHS3R-6gGOqheDvwNrMgG5ZBXrcg=/AFDFmhHxUFkbrV-_IfTqeQqzAKplZHA1GrmQvnEJ-HQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aTaOBCW24iNfU8JkHS3R-6gGOqheDvwNrMgG5ZBXrcg=/RDIosXaVhyUs6zXJd4m_S6sePUs7GfmVVLiUi03eKKg=)
---
_| Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Enforcing the rules
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I want to talk to you today about some of our rules for businesses and travel. It's exciting that going out to eat and traveling are options again, but we can't pretend like this virus isn't here. It is, and in order to keep Rhode Islanders safe and keep businesses open, we need to follow the rules.
Our beaches were busy this past weekend, but we didn't reach capacity in our parking lots. In general, folks were doing a better job of social distancing. We gave away thousands of masks and as a result, saw much better mask wearing compliance. In businesses, we saw more than 95% compliance with high-touch cleaning and more than 90% compliance in making hand washing options and hand sanitizer available. That's excellent.
But we have work to do. More than 20% of the restaurants we inspected were not taking names and numbers of a member of the party for contact tracing purposes. In more than 10% of the restaurants we inspected, we observed crowding and mingling. We must do better if we're going to maintain some sense of normalcy this summer.
Yesterday I announced that our team of inspectors at the Department of Business Regulation will be stepping up their enforcement efforts. You can see the compliance orders for businesses at [dbr.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XPzs3tK-m8pHz_PVaeRkXCMsKRTafi0aHYwZ52TqO__KC-08pwMXAxU15HVosL_VQAa0ImXvF7wdropmMhjYme8oJl6VaORhhFq4DVAsGKVUGYROkwjwDlaJBOz1VaBCnRN81fmuRo=&c=7iRyC-FTeBvlvu7kmbneBpjSmxqbVFLBHr2av7zm1AEZWzAh49viLg==&ch=9plw_rN16ND_YJhglttY_AbfluWlIxY5Zg12Zz_cGdRHVY_1vHG1zg==). If you have a concern about a business, you can also report it on that website.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XPzs3tK-m8pHz_PVaeRkXCMsKRTafi0aHYwZ52TqO__KC-08pwMXATLnlu25_w0Z0oTlfy5JAcuMizN0_IGY9j1cvJh0pDljF5w6WTp-plMUQb5R0jWAEA6FFi5nCd4fEOo4Cjy_doe_-pa6GzRUTtxXcRvOifbebEifbqjdxaM70_k5-g7zyHZGJ2XXgtuxYXE-feFsX0=&c=7iRyC-FTeBvlvu7kmbneBpjSmxqbVFLBHr2av7zm1AEZWzAh49viLg==&ch=9plw_rN16ND_YJhglttY_AbfluWlIxY5Zg12Zz_cGdRHVY_1vHG1zg==)
---
| My office and the Department of Health have gotten a lot of questions over the past week around travel, specifically from folks looking to come to Rhode Island this summer. We're excited that people are choosing to vacation here! There's nowhere better than the Ocean State this time of year and I hope you do visit. But we have rules that need to be followed.

* If you are coming to Rhode Island from outside the United States, you need to quarantine for two weeks after arriving in Rhode Island. That means no social visits, no trips to the beach, no outdoor dining at one of our fantastic restaurants. You can do all of that once your 14 days of quarantine are done.
* If you are traveling from [one of the 28 states with a 5% or greater test positive rate](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XPzs3tK-m8pHz_PVaeRkXCMsKRTafi0aHYwZ52TqO__KC-08pwMXATLnlu25_w0mbJyrI32v2txRh0GkGb_CHFn1hEZi3mL0XsTHVLhlUWXvyXwNHroulJLJON91y6HIraqSI_Z2CYqYa0EfB0L_g==&c=7iRyC-FTeBvlvu7kmbneBpjSmxqbVFLBHr2av7zm1AEZWzAh49viLg==&ch=9plw_rN16ND_YJhglttY_AbfluWlIxY5Zg12Zz_cGdRHVY_1vHG1zg==) you need to quarantine for 14 days. The only exception is providing a negative COVID-19 test. You can do that in two ways: you can get tested in your home state in the 72 hours before you travel to Rhode Island or you can get tested once you're here. If you get tested in Rhode Island, you will still need to quarantine until you receive a negative result.

If you get tested in Rhode Island and are not a Rhode Islander, you should expect to have to pay out-of-pocket. Not all testing sites are open to non-Rhode Island residents. A list of 10 locations that will test non-residents, as well as the list of states that are required to quarantine, is available on [health.ri.gov/covid](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XPzs3tK-m8pHz_PVaeRkXCMsKRTafi0aHYwZ52TqO__KC-08pwMXATLnlu25_w0mbJyrI32v2txRh0GkGb_CHFn1hEZi3mL0XsTHVLhlUWXvyXwNHroulJLJON91y6HIraqSI_Z2CYqYa0EfB0L_g==&c=7iRyC-FTeBvlvu7kmbneBpjSmxqbVFLBHr2av7zm1AEZWzAh49viLg==&ch=9plw_rN16ND_YJhglttY_AbfluWlIxY5Zg12Zz_cGdRHVY_1vHG1zg==).
These self-quarantining and testing requirements don't apply if you are a public health, public safety or healthcare worker traveling for your job. They also don't apply if you're traveling for medical treatment, to attend funeral or memorial services, to get necessities like groceries, gas or medication, or to drop off or pick up your children from day care or summer camps.
I can't stress enough how serious it is that Rhode Islanders and our visitors respect our rules this summer. What we're seeing in states across the country is devastating. I don't want to have to close beaches or parks. I don't want to have to close restaurants, but if we have folks coming from hotspots without properly quarantining and following our rules, there's no question that this virus is going to pick up steam in our state again.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XPzs3tK-m8pHz_PVaeRkXCMsKRTafi0aHYwZ52TqO__KC-08pwMXMppFg90mTqgRF9DuebfvnhfebjXYpK-BQAIKBEXGxYtopSgbbFRklz53ni3Gxnu0-SmI_emHHkFZm94N322MDHR8Bz1wMYQaR-RYu-O4L_ipVE4JoDoiBFaZceA-8IYHxA7VNi8pSzCVXr3xbW6jjs=&c=7iRyC-FTeBvlvu7kmbneBpjSmxqbVFLBHr2av7zm1AEZWzAh49viLg==&ch=9plw_rN16ND_YJhglttY_AbfluWlIxY5Zg12Zz_cGdRHVY_1vHG1zg==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XPzs3tK-m8pHz_PVaeRkXCMsKRTafi0aHYwZ52TqO__KC-08pwMXMppFg90mTqgRF9DuebfvnhfebjXYpK-BQAIKBEXGxYtopSgbbFRklz53ni3Gxnu0-SmI_emHHkFZm94N322MDHR8Bz1wMYQaR-RYu-O4L_ipVE4JoDoiBFaZceA-8IYHxA7VNi8pSzCVXr3xbW6jjs=&c=7iRyC-FTeBvlvu7kmbneBpjSmxqbVFLBHr2av7zm1AEZWzAh49viLg==&ch=9plw_rN16ND_YJhglttY_AbfluWlIxY5Zg12Zz_cGdRHVY_1vHG1zg==).
---
| Finally, I want to take a moment to briefly address nursing home and hospital visitation. Starting today, we are allowing nursing homes to once again accept visitors with additional public health precautions in place. This crisis has been difficult for our loved ones who have gone without family visits for many months, and I'm grateful that we're at a point where we're able to allow them to resume with new rules in place. For example, we want you to pre-schedule your visits, keep them short and aim to have visits outside if possible.
Today, we're also announcing updated guidelines for limited hospital visitation, [which you can see here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XPzs3tK-m8pHz_PVaeRkXCMsKRTafi0aHYwZ52TqO__KC-08pwMXATLnlu25_w0vuMdJdKW8NpM54UK6-ZuK0bINkUEy_HYObiAYsvwzKEjcfnu1te4jpEV6nwiaFoJiGgCapQiJ-ss_PdXh42DdaOnndtQgg8altnJaFqEgnjj8E9La8ac2DGvcr8QMzmXDbQ3o65ikMZZruDaM345BEhmHLvcFoCyhHq0YOOEhw8=&c=7iRyC-FTeBvlvu7kmbneBpjSmxqbVFLBHr2av7zm1AEZWzAh49viLg==&ch=9plw_rN16ND_YJhglttY_AbfluWlIxY5Zg12Zz_cGdRHVY_1vHG1zg==). The guidelines will vary from hospital to hospital, but they will include screening for symptoms, requiring face coverings, and disallowing visitors form congregating in areas like waiting rooms and gift shops. For everyone out there with a loved one in the hospital, I want you to know that we understand how hard it's been to be separated and we'll be moving to allow these in person visits to return.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, I want to talk to you today about some of our rules for businesses and travel. It's exciting that going out to eat and traveling are options again, but we can't pretend like this virus isn't here. It is, and in order to keep Rhode Islanders safe and keep businesses open, we need to follow the rules. Our beaches were busy this past weekend, but we didn't reach capacity in our parking lots. In general, folks were doing a better job of social distancing. We gave away thousands of masks and as a result, saw much better mask wearing compliance. In businesses, we saw more than 95% compliance with high-touch cleaning and more than 90% compliance in making hand washing options and hand sanitizer available. That's excellent. But we have work to do. More than 20% of the restaurants we inspected were not taking names and numbers of a member of the party for contact tracing purposes. In more than 10% of the restaurants we inspected, we observed crowding and mingling. We must do better if we're going to maintain some sense of normalcy this summer. Yesterday I announced that our team of inspectors at the Department of Business Regulation will be stepping up their enforcement efforts. You can see the compliance orders for businesses at ==. If you have a concern about a business, you can also report it on that website. | == | My office and the Department of Health have gotten a lot of questions over the past week around travel, specifically from folks looking to come to Rhode Island this summer. We're excited that people are choosing to vacation here! There's nowhere better than the Ocean State this time of year and I hope you do visit. But we have rules that need to be followed. If you are coming to Rhode Island from outside the United States, you need to quarantine for two weeks after arriving in Rhode Island. That means no social visits, no trips to the beach, no outdoor dining at one of our fantastic restaurants. You can do all of that once your 14 days of quarantine are done. If you are traveling from == you need to quarantine for 14 days. The only exception is providing a negative COVID-19 test. You can do that in two ways: you can get tested in your home state in the 72 hours before you travel to Rhode Island or you can get tested once you're here. If you get tested in Rhode Island, you will still need to quarantine until you receive a negative result. If you get tested in Rhode Island and are not a Rhode Islander, you should expect to have to pay out-of-pocket. Not all testing sites are open to non-Rhode Island residents. A list of 10 locations that will test non-residents, as well as the list of states that are required to quarantine, is available on ==. These self-quarantining and testing requirements don't apply if you are a public health, public safety or healthcare worker traveling for your job. They also don't apply if you're traveling for medical treatment, to attend funeral or memorial services, to get necessities like groceries, gas or medication, or to drop off or pick up your children from day care or summer camps. I can't stress enough how serious it is that Rhode Islanders and our visitors respect our rules this summer. What we're seeing in states across the country is devastating. I don't want to have to close beaches or parks. I don't want to have to close restaurants, but if we have folks coming from hotspots without properly quarantining and following our rules, there's no question that this virus is going to pick up steam in our state again. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | Finally, I want to take a moment to briefly address nursing home and hospital visitation. Starting today, we are allowing nursing homes to once again accept visitors with additional public health precautions in place. This crisis has been difficult for our loved ones who have gone without family visits for many months, and I'm grateful that we're at a point where we're able to allow them to resume with new rules in place. For example, we want you to pre-schedule your visits, keep them short and aim to have visits outside if possible. Today, we're also announcing updated guidelines for limited hospital visitation, ==. The guidelines will vary from hospital to hospital, but they will include screening for symptoms, requiring face coverings, and disallowing visitors form congregating in areas like waiting rooms and gift shops. For everyone out there with a loved one in the hospital, I want you to know that we understand how hard it's been to be separated and we'll be moving to allow these in person visits to return. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Here's How to Stop Walz' Mask Mandate
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=seven_dwarfs_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter -- After Rochester passed a citywide mask mandate, Mayor Kim Norton tweeted at Tim Walz... _@GovTimWalz it would be great if we had a statewide mandate so folks threatening to take their business elsewhere would not have a choice!!!_ This pandemic has certainly showed us how power hungry politicians are and how little they care about our freedom. Governor Walz has demonstrated this from the beginning. **We began our battle to End Walz’ Emergency Powers at the beginning of April with our champion in St Paul, Rep Jeremy Munson. At the time, only 15 legislators were on board with us. The Republican and Democrat establishment opposed your freedoms.** **** But by the end of April, we were able to get all 59 Republicans in the House to vote for the bill to terminate Walz’ powers. House Democrats and the Senate Republicans were against us. Then in June, we forced the Senate Republicans to do the right thing and they passed the resolution with three Senate Democrats voting in favor of it. _The vote came back up in the Minnesota House, and that time, two Democrats got on board. Unfortunately, all of the remaining Democrats cared more about protecting their party’s governor than you and my freedom. So sad._ Walz is abusing his power every day and it could get a lot worse. He’s moving to force us to wear masks and he recently hinted at shutting down our economy again. Walz is clearly power hungry! **But here’s the good news. We can finally end Walz’ powers and return our freedom if just seven more rural Democrats, who are in Trump districts, get on board with us!** Let me introduce you to the Seven Dwarfs...I mean, DFLers. Can you help us get these Democrats on board? I’ve been impressed with how many Action 4 Liberty supporters have reached out to legislators every time we ask them. It’s making a huge difference. We need you to light up these Seven DFLers' phones and email accounts right NOW. **Grumpy – Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /[rep.john.persell@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn)** **Happy – Rep Dave Lislegard - 651-296-0170 /[rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn](mailto:rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn)** **Sleepy – Rep Julie Sandstede - 651-296-0172 /[rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn](mailto:rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn)** **Bashful - Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Sneezy – Rep Jeanne Poppe - 651-296-4193 /[rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn)** **Dopey – Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Doc – Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Script** _**:** _ _Rep __________, Governor Walz' emergency powers are doing more harm to Minnesota families and businesses than good. We can’t have one person deciding what rules we need to follow. It’s time you restore our Democracy and exercise your legislative power to End Walz’ Emergency Powers now. Otherwise I’m going to do everything in my power to help your opponent this November._ Don’t have the time to contact them? Help us out by [contributing](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=seven_dwarfs_retarget&n=2) to our digital ad campaign targeting voters in their districts. Here’s a preview of one of the ads we’re running. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=seven_dwarfs_retarget&n=3 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=seven_dwarfs_retarget&n=4)
---
Let’s put an end to Walz’ Emergency Powers, stop him from forcing us to wear masks and put freedom back in your hands. It’s time Minnesota wakes back up.
## **[Help us be that wake up call!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=seven_dwarfs_retarget&n=5)**
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=seven_dwarfs_retarget&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=seven_dwarfs_retarget&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=seven_dwarfs_retarget&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: Americans only kneel to Almighty God
body:
| | Peter, I was struck by a line in President Trump’s speech last week at Mt. Rushmore and I want to underscore it. In his full-throated defense of America’s founding ideals and history, he said: “ _We stand tall, we stand proud, and we only kneel to Almighty God_.” It’s a sad reality that we need to remind ourselves of this, but we do -- and you can draw a straight line from this moment to a few decades ago, when the secular Left began ripping God away from our schools and public life. Well, have things gotten better or worse? Have American families gotten stronger or weaker? Are we moving towards a culture of life, or towards abortion at any time, for any reason? Are young people more responsible and respectful of authority, or are too many parading through the streets looting and vandalizing? I rest my case. As we waste time arguing over statues, we’re forgetting the true heart of our national Creed -- that our rights come from our Creator, and that “self-evident truth” is the basis of our founding. We are not the center of the universe -- He is; and if we can find it within ourselves to work together and get our priorities in order, our society will be happier, safer, and more just. **I believe in My Faith Votes because achieving that future is their mission.** They are raising up the next generation of Christian voters. They are engaging churches to reach their congregation to vote. They are recruiting one million voters in 11 states and providing voter resources for all 100,000 elections in 2020. And they’re leveraging the latest technology to engage non-voting believers. [**But this can only get done with your generous and ongoing support. Will you stand with me by making a secure, tax-deductible donation to My Faith Votes right now**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200709apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200709apl01nd&n=1)? I hear often about the silent majority in America -- that broad, diverse group of patriotic citizens who believe in Judeo-Christian principles and keep our nation grounded and working. Well, it’s time to light that Bat-Signal in the sky because those people are needed. When our institutions are under siege by a radical socialist agenda, and our Constitution is being hijacked, silence isn’t an option. We need to be involved and courageous for biblical truth. [**If you want to know how to help, I’m telling you right now. You can help me and My Faith Votes as we prepare for 2020 and beyond**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200709apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200709apl01nd&n=2). Thank you for your steadfast support, your strong faith and prayers, and your belief in recentering this nation around the Judeo-Christian principles that made us the envy of the world. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200709apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200709apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200709apl01nd&n=4)

clean_body: | | Peter, I was struck by a line in President Trump’s speech last week at Mt. Rushmore and I want to underscore it. In his full-throated defense of America’s founding ideals and history, he said: “ We stand tall, we stand proud, and we only kneel to Almighty God.” It’s a sad reality that we need to remind ourselves of this, but we do -- and you can draw a straight line from this moment to a few decades ago, when the secular Left began ripping God away from our schools and public life. Well, have things gotten better or worse? Have American families gotten stronger or weaker? Are we moving towards a culture of life, or towards abortion at any time, for any reason? Are young people more responsible and respectful of authority, or are too many parading through the streets looting and vandalizing? I rest my case. As we waste time arguing over statues, we’re forgetting the true heart of our national Creed -- that our rights come from our Creator, and that “self-evident truth” is the basis of our founding. We are not the center of the universe -- He is; and if we can find it within ourselves to work together and get our priorities in order, our society will be happier, safer, and more just. I believe in My Faith Votes because achieving that future is their mission. They are raising up the next generation of Christian voters. They are engaging churches to reach their congregation to vote. They are recruiting one million voters in 11 states and providing voter resources for all 100,000 elections in 2020. And they’re leveraging the latest technology to engage non-voting believers. ? I hear often about the silent majority in America -- that broad, diverse group of patriotic citizens who believe in Judeo-Christian principles and keep our nation grounded and working. Well, it’s time to light that Bat-Signal in the sky because those people are needed. When our institutions are under siege by a radical socialist agenda, and our Constitution is being hijacked, silence isn’t an option. We need to be involved and courageous for biblical truth. . Thank you for your steadfast support, your strong faith and prayers, and your belief in recentering this nation around the Judeo-Christian principles that made us the envy of the world. United. name: Tina Smith
subject: The next phase of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hello — **In just a moment, I am going to ask you to add a personal contribution toward our campaign today. But first, I need a moment to explain why your hard-earned dollars are so important if we want to win this November.** July is a critical month in any election, but especially this one. With less than four months until Election Day, we are officially in the final stretch and preparing to launch the next phase of our campaign. Here’s what that means: Right now is about the time we need to ramp up our investments in organizing efforts and make sure our message is in front of as many voters as possible. Like I said, July is a critical month. We must kick into high gear if we want to flip the Senate, end Mitch McConnell’s majority, and send Donald Trump packing in November. But our plans will only be successful if we manage to stop the Republicans from flipping Minnesota red. I’ll be honest, this will be no small feat. The Trump campaign has already launched a seven-figure ad campaign in our state and considers us a top target. Trump himself takes every opportunity to mention winning in our state when he can, too. Not to mention, Republican groups with ties to Mitch McConnell have already dumped millions into battleground Senate races across the country — and we expect much more to come. It all comes down to this: If we can’t hit our fundraising goal in the first few days of July, I worry we may get drowned out in the final months of this election — the most important months of any campaign, but especially ours. **So, I am personally asking you to add a donation to my campaign before our fundraising deadline tomorrow. name: urgent@siegelfortexas.org
subject: a better tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress
body:
We're flipping TX-10 BLUE

| Derek
Did you see my latest Op-Ed in the Union Leader? It is critical that we revamp our tax code so that New Hampshire families are able to keep more of their own money and don't need an advanced degree from MIT just to do their own taxes! Read about my plan below. Thank you, - Matt

---
---
| |

|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
# Matt Mayberry: Tax code is stacked against ordinary Americans
FEW THINGS are as terrifying as a letter from the IRS. The reason for this fear is justified — our tax code is so overly complex that it generally requires a professional to help average Americans in navigating the treacherous waters of the federal tax code. The reason that President Trump pushed the normal April 15th filing deadline back to July 15th is because of the COVID-19 crisis, many Americans simply could not meet with their accountants and tax preparers. The tax code isn’t overly complex on accident — the entire point behind our tax code is to make it so complex that only the most rich and powerful are able to navigate it. Our tax code is a Byzantine maze of special interest loopholes. While the rich and the powerful are able to employ armies of accountants and lobbyists to twist the tax code to their advantage, average Americans, especially small business owners, are left wandering a regulatory minefield. I know about the justified terror in receiving a letter from the IRS first-hand. I know how broken the system is, how stacked it is in favor of the rich and powerful, because I was once on the receiving end of an IRS action...and it’s not fun. About a decade ago, I hired a supposedly well-respected accountant to handle my taxes. Unfortunately, despite his glowing recommendations, the income taxes that were filed on my behalf were grossly deficient. I was told, at the time, that every deduction was within the “legal and legitimate limits set forth by the IRS.” He was the professional, I was just out selling real estate so I signed the returns. Hindsight is always 20/20. Fast forward a few years and I received a letter from the IRS explaining that I was behind on my taxes and severe penalties and interest had accrued. The review of my filings discovered that due to the wrongful actions of my accountant, I underpaid the IRS by about $70,000. With penalties and interest, and interest on the interest with more penalties added, the IRS stated I owed them over $300,000. How did this happen? I did what I was supposed to. I hired a licensed professional. I paid the taxes he told me were owed and somehow, I am at fault? I get it, it’s my signature on the bottom of the filing. I’m the taxpayer, it is my responsibility at the end of the day. I’m the taxpayer who trusted a seasoned professional. It took me years to finally settle the matter and make my repayments. It sounds strange saying it, but I was fortunate. Through the IRS Fresh Start Program, I was able to finally settle, and get my financial life back on track. I was able to pull myself out of that hole, many are not so lucky. Like millions of other Americans, I quickly learned that the IRS doesn’t care if you hired an MIT mathematician or a Wall Street financial tycoon to do your accounting. If there is a mistake, they treat it like you simply decided not to pay. The system is simply too rigid and far too complex. No one deserves to go through that kind of stress and anxiety for no fault of their own. It doesn’t have to be this way. My solution: simplify the tax code. Let’s get rid of all of the unnecessary rules, loopholes and exceptions and have a fairer, simpler system where every American pays less and can file their taxes on something as simple as a postcard. I know that this idea will likely anger H&R; Block, Turbotax and all of the Democrats that celebrate April 15th like it’s Christmas Day, but there is simply no reason that we need a 25-pound, 10,000-page tax code. Americans should not need to have an advanced tax degree to pay their taxes. I am a strong believer in allowing taxpayers to keep more of their own money. The economy thrives when we are able to spend our money on the things that are important to us, not some bureaucrat in Washington. President Trump’s tax cuts were a great start. We should reauthorize and expand them. As part of that expansion I would propose going even further and work for a comprehensive overhaul of the entire tax codes. New Hampshire has shown that you can cut taxes and reduce spending to balance the budget. It is time to send someone to Congress who shares those New Hampshire values. It is time to bring our hometown small-business principles down to the Swamp....and finally drain it. Matt Mayberry of Dover is a Republican candidate in New Hampshire’s First Congressional District.

The economy thrives when we are able to spend our money on the things that are important to us, not some bureaucrat in Washington. President Trump’s tax cuts were a great start. We should reauthorize and expand them. As part of that expansion I would propose going even further and work for a comprehensive overhaul of the entire tax codes. New Hampshire has shown that you can cut taxes and reduce spending to balance the budget. It is time to send someone to Congress who shares those New Hampshire values. It is time to bring our hometown small-business principles down to the Swamp....and finally drain it. Matt Mayberry of Dover is a Republican candidate in New Hampshire’s First Congressional District. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress | | | Matt Mayberry for Congress | | P.O. Box 1776, Dover NH 03821 United States | | | ---|---|---

* _**[Our average online donation was just $28!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18193757/220207866/433702908?amount=28&refcode=20200709_em_fr_FEC_all_l2_btest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTFiMjhlNi0wZmMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4uxYEy1GXRad76Jc9epAPsQqHRVpV1kQRFJfgsyZm0=)**_

name: Joe Biden 2020
subject: politely asking you to take our latest survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We're in the heat of the general election, and it's go-time. |
---
Peter --

Later this month, we'll mark 100 days left to Election Day. **That 's right, we're in the heat of the general election, and it's go-time.**

Much of the latest polling has Joe _SURGING_ in the battleground states that will decide the outcome of the general election, but the truth is, we can't take anything for granted. Not a single vote.

We're already starting to lay down our Get Out the Vote plans in key swing states, and working to collect as much voter information as possible. And because we're knocking fewer doors right now to practice safe social distancing, digital outreach is all the more important.

[So we're setting a goal to collect 2143 responses from Pennsylvania to our latest poll. Peter, can you represent Pennsylvania today and tell us if you plan to vote for Joe Biden this fall?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf17/1cd0ac28/89bc448d/357c06aa/2144309433/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2") __ __| __| __ **DO YOU PLAN TO VOTE FOR JOE BIDEN THIS FALL IN PENNSYLVANIA?**

| | [YES >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf17/1cd0ac28/89bc448d/357c06aa/2144309433/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2")
---
| [NO >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf17/1cd0ac28/89bc448d/357c06aa/2144309433/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2")
---
| [UNDECIDED >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf17/1cd0ac28/89bc448d/357c06aa/2144309433/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2")
---
__
__
__
Even if you've answered a similar poll for us before, it's important that we get an updated response from you, Peter. **Which is why we hope you 'll be one of the 2143 people we need from Pennsylvania to respond.**

Like we said -- no vote is taken for granted on this campaign. Joe and the rest of our team are going to continue to work our hearts out over these final four months to earn every last vote, and win this battle for the soul of the nation.

We want to be conscious of your time, so we've made this poll real quick. **Peter, click below to begin our new supporter poll and let us know if you plan to vote for Joe in Pennsylvania this fall:**

[https://go.joebiden.com/vote-for-joe-in#Pennsylvania](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf17/1cd0ac28/89bc448d/357c06aa/2144309433/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/july-vote-for-joe-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.07.09_B1_julyvote4joe_X__F1_S2_C1__full_t2")

Thanks for your time and for your support,

Joe Biden 2020

clean_body: We're in the heat of the general election, and it's go-time. | Peter -- Later this month, we'll mark 100 days left to Election Day. That 's right, we're in the heat of the general election, and it's go-time. Much of the latest polling has Joe SURGING in the battleground states that will decide the outcome of the general election, but the truth is, we can't take anything for granted. Not a single vote. We're already starting to lay down our Get Out the Vote plans in key swing states, and working to collect as much voter information as possible. And because we're knocking fewer doors right now to practice safe social distancing, digital outreach is all the more important. "" | | DO YOU PLAN TO VOTE FOR JOE BIDEN THIS FALL IN PENNSYLVANIA? | | "" | "" | "" Even if you've answered a similar poll for us before, it's important that we get an updated response from you, Peter. Which is why we hope you 'll be one of the 2143 people we need from Pennsylvania to respond. Like we said -- no vote is taken for granted on this campaign. Joe and the rest of our team are going to continue to work our hearts out over these final four months to earn every last vote, and win this battle for the soul of the nation. We want to be conscious of your time, so we've made this poll real quick. Peter, click below to begin our new supporter poll and let us know if you plan to vote for Joe in Pennsylvania this fall: "" Thanks for your time and for your support, Joe Biden 2020 | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" "" Donated to Biden for President? No, not yet! Suggested Action: "" | "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

Being raised by a mother who had to speak only with a whisper taught me that often the most important voices are the ones we have to lean in to hear. On day one, I want to go to work to change how Washington operates. We need to get dark money out of politics, ban members of Congress from owning individual stocks, and make sure our leaders listen to people. **[In order to have a voice in changing Washington, I need to win this election and that happens because of small-dollar donations from folks like you. President Trump asked me to join his Illinois Victory Team – he knows that I’m fighting for Illinois every single day, and we both need you to join us [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=f766f21e599b4d00b05d586b5f7d5cbf&_e=iJ-hinDUGe4LImruPMSHRfUVz26CazHOHueWfd68KPpXU5AZdCCO1xqeNLLr9dLA9HgzXYcjJ20tGl7qavE4oWRC5K2_7K88Fb82dZJgZOnTk15tuem6IPYzRaAAX1bOSTOVJXlgbRE1U6-e9OfqMloK3q7XXLAAZggQDwLC0v2cJyGikxpiADU1oXYx3OA9wMTqN3tvuz6EiphmlawKUTKhdjnR3ONDb0JcS-Ot1dy2w9QErvXPDMT1G2EA8pgL0u-pZ3Km42Tuci5bf9mBg4wt1YP5n7dU75f03kntUQg4rTii-5ckSJCpZPc4dKlyUr9B9vROnweAIZJiS-lLOJdn3_YQYDShnw3rKFy8bT5tpue8KHWY0NrkTVwQzGx1j-I0G0Ltw-3WdLL7AKRJTv6V2AWgN_ia1V92dT5ULAk3ypQqLWp3pFAHrTpKVlLVsGaDIyYUCrXkQXrei_V6xD7lUaiGsTILfjfhJb4BYjA%3D) Jobs are **up** and Unemployment is **down** Under President Trump **Illinois can’t afford to lose this Progress in November!** **[Support President Trump’s Illinois Victory Team >>>](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=f766f21e599b4d00b05d586b5f7d5cbf&_e=iJ-hinDUGe4LImruPMSHRfUVz26CazHOHueWfd68KPpXU5AZdCCO1xqeNLLr9dLA9HgzXYcjJ20tGl7qavE4oWRC5K2_7K88Fb82dZJgZOnTk15tuem6IPYzRaAAX1bOSTOVJXlgbRE1U6-e9OfqMloK3q7XXLAAZggQDwLC0v2cJyGikxpiADU1oXYx3OA9wMTqN3tvuz6EiphmlawKUTKhdjnR3ONDb0JcS-Ot1dy2w9QErvXPDMT1G2EA8pgL0u-pZ3Km42Tuci5bf9mBg88DiPjzCvQUkk1faIBp1OwBI-dt1OVgV-yQCOsj2sUTCUop3mDFZK9O6NTzCShVVbNnxUcIz1L_4MDSc1rMIbbWG17NE7DjMElEK8qG1S3RRidcnd1Ns_c-sJvpulMD6M8LgAwuctxdSiQ3gtBpO1icdSIj6p_HoOJBNtUBnNQkVGPuMcnTlZg2BBVcv3Q3QXftOPN67ZVmftswVzKJEx0%3D)** Friend, Illinois has orchestrated one of the greatest economic comebacks our nation has ever seen since President Trump took office – and now our businesses, workers, and their families are reaping the benefits.
**Here’s how we’ve been able to come back together under President Trump’s leadership:**
* 146,000 new jobs created
* Unemployment lowered to 4% after crossing 11% under Obama
* 22,400 manufacturing jobs added
* 96,000 less Illinoisians depending on food stamps

[**JOIN OUR $18 MONEY BOMB TO KEEP ILLINOIS WINNING**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=f766f21e599b4d00b05d586b5f7d5cbf&_e=iJ-hinDUGe4LImruPMSHRfUVz26CazHOHueWfd68KPpXU5AZdCCO1xqeNLLr9dLApRr8ae-eS-wcY_a-KHLl_fkE_KmmgfS-ezTlKVumxH4fKPP_U4xaa6KNyuya36G5k0nrWgxiTmjq4IvIejXtkLaNksUjxQb2OwX3tXFT1NUDIt7zoNaVQ9_e21Q3ZESwUpr8ncp4Fwt_M_5vtC56LB0yG2tR9b4KxQt8f9RxrqUzBvg4O0RytTMdzluJ44RCM-LQ1IKay8NvsEz1TloCMzcdHkNHwS_9PXs6CWkf7Vq20B1FtTsuoR7juCSNA_-tcAR8U5ht8UrhUZYqIrD9OLbB1tEnnkIcBGxXrMivD3NSyJg7HShBTty9-C4eB5TaX4d1IqZTGWzIO0qPN432ml6IyKEamGS1XrruI-WVIMnCjITE0JFsSX8StJg47lkYY4g2hC-EuqA6ua4OJXN10TwyleERQXozFQueZ5raU2Rgt0E_Obn_4qY_U5eGf7Vx)

**That’s why President Trump asked me to join his Illinois Victory Team – he knows that I’m fighting for Illinois every single day, and we both need you to join us to lead our state to four more years of winning!**
Friend, will you chip in **$18 today** and pledge to match that amount on July 18th to support me and President Trump as we work to bring more economic progress to Illinois 18th District?

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Emily's List Endorses Dr. Nina Ahmad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | Dear , Did you know that I'm the **very first woman of color** to win the Democratic Nominee for a statewide executive office in Pennsylvania? This is historic and I know that I will need all the support possible to win in November.[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/5AfEZmBjnxdLQdQs7e7SF5eCvSKvlTrHBAljc6RTefE=)**[Emily's List endorsed me early](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/5AfEZmBjnxdLQdQs7e7SF5eCvSKvlTrHBAljc6RTefE=) **because they know our fight for women's rights needs a champion in the Auditor General's Office.
**_[Will you join Emily's List in supporting this early historic](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/5AfEZmBjnxdLQdQs7e7SF5eCvSKvlTrHBAljc6RTefE=) _****_[movement?](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/5AfEZmBjnxdLQdQs7e7SF5eCvSKvlTrHBAljc6RTefE=)_** Thanks to Pennsylvania voters, we now have a remarkably diverse and qualified statewide ticket. I am so excited to support the efforts to turn PA Blue this fall! I look forward to furthering the advancement of issues that are paramount to working women and their families - embodying the mantra "Leave No One Behind".
Will you join the movement for equity and fairness and make sure that women's voices and values are heard in Pennsylvania? **[Will you donate $15, $35, $75, 100, $250, $500, or $1,000 to help us keep Pennsylvania accountable? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/9-BBSAZBnvdjqURGGCYXh2oWLnGVK16K8RMEnTFeNWI=)**

Like EMILY's List, many concerned Americans realize that to rescue our country from the chaos and corruption of this current administration, Pennsylvania is a critical Battleground state- a must win state! **_[That's why we are asking you to join us and renew your support as we prepare for the General Election. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/5AfEZmBjnxdLQdQs7e7SF5eCvSKvlTrHBAljc6RTefE=)_** Dr. Nina Ahmad,

P.S.Would you consider chipping in a monthly **_[$20.20 donation to our History Maker Fund](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/5AfEZmBjnxdLQdQs7e7SF5eCvSKvlTrHBAljc6RTefE=)_** to make sure we can get my message out and grow our base? [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/5AfEZmBjnxdLQdQs7e7SF5eCvSKvlTrHBAljc6RTefE=) Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/B3fWTzIudE1_h8PoSNoX_zwcMEi7FDceVrZOn7PkixM=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/tkTV469lZqvy2dVGeNCXR3sECEtsXR9BeNNFayU_PrM=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/VeJ5yCVFnN0bX-k-tNn-Scq-GF9VUaoubvAtW7SgbQs=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rUR2lWMRbFX45MC2ajwzxhdFjqktXuNmbyZUjANMwYk=/4aF9ekIUWiPz6j6VL1oDDFW60dXbEAdlvMcZVUObVew=?hl=en)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Nehls’ attorneys threatening Kathaleen Wall with legal action & calls Litvak family liars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Do you want a congressman who tries to silence sex trafficking victims? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/69e8ae4af5c4/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12563302?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: KathaleenWall.com** Thursday, July 9, 2020
---
| | **Sheriff Troy Nehls Tries To Silence Sex Trafficking Victims He Swore To Protect **

_Sugar Land Conservative Kathaleen Wall Responds to Sheriff Nehls’ Attempt
to Silence Sex Trafficking Victims_
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall today responded to a letter received from Nehls’ attorneys threatening her with legal action and calling the Litvak family liars. A copy of the letter can be [found here](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=9b0557b10f&e=01c99b7fbd). “Troy Nehls hiding behind his high priced lawyers to try to silence the Litvak family is simply disgusting. Texans want a leader and not someone like Troy Nehls who will compromise on our values in Washington.” said Wall. “Nehls turned a blind eye to sexual slavery, and even called it a ‘lifestyle decision’ for one of its victims. Shame on Troy Nehls.”

“I will not be bullied by attempts to silence this family that was victimized by predators allowed to run free in Fort Bend County under Troy Nehls’ watch. And I certainly won’t let him wash his hands of the incompetence that led to rampant sex trafficking in our county and in our district.” added Wall.

"Based on how our case was handled, and others involving sexual exploitation in Fort Bend County, it is my opinion that Sheriff Nehls has carefully crafted a public image and narrative to portray Fort Bend County as a low crime community," mother Kelly Litvak said. "Victims of sexual assault have been influenced to not not proceed with charges through comments from the Fort Bend County Sheriff Office like, "Are you sure you want to file charges? It will be your word against his." These comments to victims of sexual assault are [reflected in the numbers](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=c114698ea8&e=01c99b7fbd): From 2013 to the beginning of 2020 there were 624 sexual assaults reported and only 27 arrests. This is a 4.4% arrest rate."

Below please find a partial script for “Courtney’s Family’s Story,” and the YouTube link here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5F4yT-gpl78](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=c1b36d6bcc&e=01c99b7fbd)
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=940183db43&e=01c99b7fbd)
**Courtney Litvak:** I was 17 and I was drawn into the life of sex trafficking as a minor.

**Kelly Litvak:** When we went to sit down with Sheriff Troy Nehls for a two-hour meeting... I felt so confident that he was going to immediately sound the alarms...

But instead, Sheriff Troy Nehls has ...publicly blamed and shamed our family.

**Alan Litvak** : Sheriff Troy Nehls, knows what's going on in his county... and has the gall to re-victimize a young lady, a mom, a dad, who have been through hell.

That's not serving the public, that's harming the public.

We don't need people like Troy Nehls in Fort Bend County, or Washington, DC.

And I’d love to look you in the eye and have you tell me how you can possibly sit there and not do your job and not protect my family – because that’s what you’ve done for years.

###

subject: [ACTION REQUESTED] Protect women’s health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
This is just another attack, in a long line of attacks, on women’s health care that we’ve seen across the country. It’s time for our elected leaders to take action and protect reproductive freedom.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18195032/220241674/462758527?refcode=em_pet_2020.07.09_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=726cf409-1dc2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZjZjQwOS0xZGMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgCyQKZ_oMEHPbMMCd_lMDc5OwccaQXmQHFwnHjJrnc=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Team,

Yesterday, the Supreme Court handed down a ruling that allows employers to deny contraception coverage to their employees based on their personal beliefs. **This is just another attack, in a long line of attacks, on women’s health care that we’ve seen across the country. It’s time for our elected leaders to take action and protect reproductive freedom.

[Will you stand with Eugene and call on Congress to protect women’s health care by signing our petition now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18195033/220241675/-1325069961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZjZjQwOS0xZGMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgCyQKZ_oMEHPbMMCd_lMDc5OwccaQXmQHFwnHjJrnc=&emci=0e7591b6-f8c1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=726cf409-1dc2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249)** | [Take Action](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18195034/220241676/-1325069961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZjZjQwOS0xZGMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgCyQKZ_oMEHPbMMCd_lMDc5OwccaQXmQHFwnHjJrnc=&emci=0e7591b6-f8c1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=726cf409-1dc2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249)
---

The Affordable Care Act expanded contraception coverage, required maternity care, and allowed millions of women with pre-existing conditions to access health insurance.

**But not only has Scott Perry voted time and time again to repeal the ACA, he openly dismissed the need for maternity care saying:_“I have two children, and we’re not having anymore. I don’t want to pay for maternity care.”._ **

Women’s health care is on the line, but Scott Perry is unconcerned because it doesn’t impact him personally. Our community deserves leaders who will fight for everyone in this district, not pick and choose based on their own self-interests.

[**Add your name if you agree we must put an end to attacks on reproductive rights and fight to protect women’s health care access >>** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18195035/220241677/-1325069961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZjZjQwOS0xZGMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgCyQKZ_oMEHPbMMCd_lMDc5OwccaQXmQHFwnHjJrnc=&emci=0e7591b6-f8c1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=726cf409-1dc2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249) [Add my name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18195036/220241678/-1325069961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZjZjQwOS0xZGMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgCyQKZ_oMEHPbMMCd_lMDc5OwccaQXmQHFwnHjJrnc=&emci=0e7591b6-f8c1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=726cf409-1dc2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249)
---

**Birth control is essential health care. Maternity care is essential health care._Women’s health is non-negotiable._** In Congress, Eugene will always fight to ensure health care access for women in South Central PA and across the country.

Thank you for taking action with us, team.

\--Team Eugene __Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit [EugeneForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18195037/220241679/1960319551?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZjZjQwOS0xZGMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgCyQKZ_oMEHPbMMCd_lMDc5OwccaQXmQHFwnHjJrnc=&emci=0e7591b6-f8c1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=726cf409-1dc2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249). subject: Minneapolis Community Leaders Call on City Council to Respond to Recent Violence
body:
“The recent and ongoing crime wave in Minneapolis has some Black community leaders calling on the Minneapolis City Council to do something about it” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa3de576fa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Minneapolis Community Leaders Call on City Council to Respond to Recent Violence**

“The recent and ongoing crime wave in Minneapolis has some Black community leaders calling on the Minneapolis City Council to help them do something about it,” Karen Scullin reports for Fox 9 Minneapolis.

“‘When the City Council start talking about abolish and dismantling law enforcement it’s destroying, it’s destroying our community right now,’ said Al Flowers, a community activist.”

While signing an executive order on safe policing last month, President Trump said “we must support the brave men and women in blue who police our streets and keep us safe.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6dd7b4a25f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “It was obvious in March, back when members of the free press first began to praise China for supposedly defeating the coronavirus pandemic, that many journalists and commentators were parroting literal Chinese Communist Party propaganda.” Now, a new first-hand account reveals that China's actions were even worse than many of us realized, Becket Adams writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ee9860059&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| The Supreme Court yesterday ruled “in favor of the Little Sisters of the Poor, a charitable order of Catholic nuns, deciding once again that the government cannot compel them to subsidize birth control and abortion-inducing drugs” as was required by Obamacare, Alexandra DeSanctis writes in [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec4fb33e27&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The City of Seattle held a racially segregated employee training session aimed at White staffers and instructing them on ‘undoing your own whiteness,’” according to documents obtained by _City Journal_ editor Christopher F. Rufo. One handout said white staffers must give up “the land” and their “guaranteed physical safety” in order to support the cause of racial justice. Read more from Danielle Wallace in [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f75ae37a52&e=3ee4985eea).
---

name: Sandy Smith
subject: So sick of the hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ie2WLEhszpNxmng&b=bLpyuejTWLoxo2UDfM97bA)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I'm a fighter, and I will fight against Nancy Pelosi and for America, every chance I get. I will fight for the rule of law!
I can't believe there are Democrat mayors and governors who are excusing the violent rioters- and, in fact, encouraging them!
It's not just one or two. The entire Democrat caucus in Congress approves of, and encourages, the violent rioters!
How do we know this?
_**House Democrats unanimously blocked a resolution condemning acts of violence and rioting—including the "deliberate targeting of law enforcement officers"** —in the wake of George Floyd's death._
_The resolution, which was introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R., Fla.) late Thursday morning, condemned Floyd's killing at the hands of police, calling it "inconsistent with the values and conduct expected of law enforcement officers." The resolution also supported peaceful protesters, but it noted that protests have been "exploited by violent extremists" carrying out "acts of violence, looting, destruction of business and personal property, and additional loss of life."_
_Rep. Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) spoke in favor of the resolution, arguing that while Floyd's death was "wrong as wrong could be," there is a "big difference between peaceful protest and rioting." Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen."_
_No House Democrats voted in favor of Steube's resolution. Rep. Justin Amash (I., Mich.) voted with Republicans to support the measure._
[What do I need to convince you of the hopelessness of the Democrats](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ie2WLEhszpNxmng&b=bLpyuejTWLoxo2UDfM97bA)? They literally cannot bring themselves to vote against the targeting of police officers, violence or rioting.
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=ie2WLEhszpNxmng&b=bLpyuejTWLoxo2UDfM97bA)
---

**_My opponent, G.K. Butterfield, the Deputy Democrat Whip, voted in favor of violent riots - riots that destroyed black neighborhoods, murdered innocent people, and targeted police. _**

_In an impassioned press conference Sunday night, Atlanta Mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms issued a full-throated call for citizens to stop "shooting each other up on our streets," after an 8-year-old girl was shot and killed on the Fourth of July near a Wendy's that has become a flashpoint of anti-police Black Lives Matter (BLM) protests in the city._

_Bottoms, a Democrat who is considered a potential running mate for Joe Biden, made the remarks as she fought through tears -- and the nation endured a new bout of urban carnage. Sixty-three people were injured and 17 killed in Chicago, including two children, over the weekend; and in New York City, 44 were hurt and at least six killed._

Dozens of violent shootings. An eight year old girl shot and killed. THAT is what G.K. Butterfield supports. It's what he voted for.
