clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I'm a fighter, and I will fight against Nancy Pelosi and for America, every chance I get. I will fight for the rule of law! I can't believe there are Democrat mayors and governors who are excusing the violent rioters- and, in fact, encouraging them! It's not just one or two. The entire Democrat caucus in Congress approves of, and encourages, the violent rioters! How do we know this? House Democrats unanimously blocked a resolution condemning acts of violence and rioting—including the "deliberate targeting of law enforcement officers" —in the wake of George Floyd's death. The resolution, which was introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R., Fla.) late Thursday morning, condemned Floyd's killing at the hands of police, calling it "inconsistent with the values and conduct expected of law enforcement officers." The resolution also supported peaceful protesters, but it noted that protests have been "exploited by violent extremists" carrying out "acts of violence, looting, destruction of business and personal property, and additional loss of life." Rep. Jim Jordan (R., Ohio) spoke in favor of the resolution, arguing that while Floyd's death was "wrong as wrong could be," there is a "big difference between peaceful protest and rioting." Jordan also spoke against defunding the police, calling it "one of the craziest public policy proposals I have ever seen." No House Democrats voted in favor of Steube's resolution. Rep. Justin Amash (I., Mich.) voted with Republicans to support the measure. ? They literally cannot bring themselves to vote against the targeting of police officers, violence or rioting. My opponent, G.K. Butterfield, the Deputy Democrat Whip, voted in favor of violent riots - riots that destroyed black neighborhoods, murdered innocent people, and targeted police. In an impassioned press conference Sunday night, Atlanta Mayor Keisha Lance Bottoms issued a full-throated call for citizens to stop "shooting each other up on our streets," after an 8-year-old girl was shot and killed on the Fourth of July near a Wendy's that has become a flashpoint of anti-police Black Lives Matter (BLM) protests in the city. Bottoms, a Democrat who is considered a potential running mate for Joe Biden, made the remarks as she fought through tears -- and the nation endured a new bout of urban carnage. Sixty-three people were injured and 17 killed in Chicago, including two children, over the weekend; and in New York City, 44 were hurt and at least six killed. Dozens of violent shootings. An eight year old girl shot and killed. THAT is what G.K. Butterfield supports. It's what he voted for. I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi in her support for violent rioters! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you. G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I . I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this! For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. name: Bill Olson
subject: The left has jumped the shark
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to be YOUR champion in Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

The reason the extreme Left is attacking everyone and rioting is because they know they can't win elections. Look at the sort of policies they like!

-Tearing down historical statues

-Abolishing the police

-Abolishing the Constitution

-Attacking with violence anyone who disagrees with them

-Abolishing churches and Christianity

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

These people don't want to do away with just Confederate statues. THEY WANT TO DO AWAY WITH AMERICA!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

Part of their plan to do away with America is to get rid of the rule of law. Our country was founded on "Equal Justice Under Law".

But what the radical Left- this "new" Democrat party- wants is NOT freedom, NOR liberty.

What they want is chaos, destruction, and murder. But I don't!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

They with to take away your freedom and replace it with a Communist dictatorship.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

I am not a career politician or a slick fundraiser. I'm a career soldier who wants to defend our country against all enemies- foreign and domestic.

That's why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

Will you join this fight with me? I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA
I have a big fundraising deadline TODAY- and I'm still about $9,000

short of my goal. I need you to help me reach my goal!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

The radical Democrats are going to lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gEccpqwo4_6OuRU&b=wVikbD79a6V6DrZWJOFXsA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

subject: We're turning Texas blue with Sunrise Movement Dallas!
body:
We're partnering with Sunrise Movement Dallas to get 2 Progressive candidates through their runoff elections on Monday, July 13th! JOIN US! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=af0b1f3ebc&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
# **TEXAS IS TURNING BLUE**
---
|
### **Future Generations is partnering with Sunrise Movement Dallas to support two candidates in Texas**
---
| We are down to the wire and need to help Lorenzo Sanchez(TX-HD67) and Jasmine Crockett(TX-HD100) win their runoff elections, Monday, July 13th!
---
| [JOIN A TEXT PARTY & HELP US TEXT 40,000 VOTERS](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ff554ea236&e=66979298f9 "JOIN A TEXT PARTY & HELP US TEXT 40,000 VOTERS")
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8dc1af2d98&e=66979298f9)
---
| Sunrise Movement Dallas is a youth-led coalition to make the climate crisis an urgent priority, end the corrupting influence of fossil fuel executives and to elect leaders who stand for the health and well-being of all people. Future Generations is partnering with Sunrise Movement Dallas to support two candidates in Texas who are fighting for climate justice, racial justice, and economic justice. In the face of the current pandemic, we must do all we can to reach voters and share their message. Will you commit to turn Texas blue?
---
| [JOIN A TEXT PARTY & HELP US TEXT 40,000 VOTERS](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8060c18bfe&e=66979298f9 "JOIN A TEXT PARTY & HELP US TEXT 40,000 VOTERS")
---
|
---
|
# MEET THE TEXAS CANDIDATES
---
| _Both candidates are in the Democratic runoff elections in Texas. Election Day is Monday, July 13th._
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=6920827b75&e=66979298f9)
---
Lorenzo Sanchez is running for House District 67. he's an unyielding champion for marginalized communities. Lorenzo’s values are centered from the early struggles of his mother, who left Mexico as a child in search of her family. Seeing his mother working tirelessly and at times going hungry to make sure her children ate, inspired Lorenzo to fight for our most vulnerable. We are proud to endorse Lorenzo along with Sunrise Movement Dallas, because he will champion for a Future Generations with a bold GND plan and an inclusive economy that leaves not one Texan behind.
| [JOIN THE TEXTING PARTY FOR LORENZO](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=661bfeedb6&e=66979298f9 "JOIN THE TEXTING PARTY FOR LORENZO")
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=6c14f0fc88&e=66979298f9)
---
Jasmine Crockett is running for House District 100. Jasmine Crockett is a Green New Deal champion fighting for clean air and water, housing justice, and environmental protections for all communities. Jasmine understands that environmental racism can only be dismantled with a Green New Deal that centers all frontline communities. Jasmine is also a criminal defense and civil rights attorney who has represented families in Texas who've been victims to a failing system.
| [JOIN THE TEXTING PARTY FOR JASMINE](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ad7440ae5b&e=66979298f9 "JOIN THE TEXTING PARTY FOR JASMINE")
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, we must focus on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.**[ Will you invest today for seven generations into the future?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7c189a24ba&e=66979298f9)**
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=a4e937622f&e=66979298f9)
---
| Starting this Thursday, July 9th, through Monday July 13th, we will be hosting text banking parties from 3:00pm PST to 5:00pm PST to reach out to voters via text message. You will be able to sign up for additional time slots through our website if you're unavailable during the party!

RSVP HERE: [https://www.futuregenerations.earth/text-to-turn-texas-blue](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=903c5dbfc4&e=66979298f9)

We will be meeting at 3:00pm on Zoom (we'll send you the Zoom link via email once you RSVP), having a 10 minute meet and greet with the amazing candidate, and then each send 1,000 texts out to voters.

If you signed up at a different time slot, one of our members, Chiara from Future Gens, or Priscilla from Sunrise Movement Dallas will be available to guide you through!
---
| [TEXT TO TURN TEXAS BLUE!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0b3eba0ddf&e=66979298f9 "TEXT TO TURN TEXAS BLUE!")
---
|
---
|
### MEET OUR FUTURE GEN TEAM: ROZA CALDERON
---
| |
---
_**Californian in Texas**_
It is an honor to work with Future Generations and youth across the country to ensure our leaders understand that our relationship with the environment is undeniably interconnected with economic, racial, healthcare, and housing justice across the US. We must focus on policy that will deliver a sustainable and just world seven generations into the future.

Roza Calderon
Executive Director
[Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1f873a5a20&e=66979298f9)

Future Generations PACPO Box 1861Olympia, WA 98507-2394

body:

On Wed, Jul 8, 2020 at 7:03 PM Madison Hinz <[madison@jessiforcongress.com](mailto:madison@jessiforcongress.com)> wrote:

> Hi everyone,
>
>
> This Saturday, we're going to have an opportunity for volunteers to get together and phone bank and walk as a group to get Jessi's message out and secure votes for her in district 22.
>
>
> From 2:30-6:30 pm, we'll meet at The Griddle in Boca Raton (address below) to have a group of people making calls together, as well as a couple groups that want to canvass the surrounding neighborhoods.
>
>
> If you are able to come, and if you have a preference between door knocking and phone banking, please let me know ahead of time, so I can organize some groups for it.
>
> The Griddle
> 275 NE Spanish River Blvd.
> Boca Raton, FL, 33431
>
>
> Madison Hinz
> Executive Assistant & Volunteer Coordinator
> Jessi Melton for Congress 2020
> FL-22 (R)
> (954)837-3566
> [madison@jessiforcongress.com](mailto:madison@jessiforcongress.com)
> <https://secure.anedot.com/jessi-melton-for-congress/donate>
clean_body: Sorry, I can't make it. On Wed, Jul 8, 2020 at 7:03 PM Madison Hinz <mailto:madison@jessiforcongress.com> wrote: Hi everyone, This Saturday, we're going to have an opportunity for volunteers to get together and phone bank and walk as a group to get Jessi's message out and secure votes for her in district 22. From 2:30-6:30 pm, we'll meet at The Griddle in Boca Raton (address below) to have a group of people making calls together, as well as a couple groups that want to canvass the surrounding neighborhoods. If you are able to come, and if you have a preference between door knocking and phone banking, please let me know ahead of time, so I can organize some groups for it. The Griddle 275 NE Spanish River Blvd. Boca Raton, FL, 33431 Madison Hinz Executive Assistant & Volunteer Coordinator Jessi Melton for Congress 2020 FL-22 (R) (954)837-3566 mailto:madison@jessiforcongress.com <>

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: front-runner status
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Did you see the news, friend?

Our team just let me know that we raised $950,000 last quarter! Momentum is firmly on our side and, thanks to your help, we’re quickly becoming one of the strongest Congressional campaigns in the country.

Friend, I am so grateful to have you on my team.

We are building a strong, inclusive movement in TX-22 by engaging new voters, building a network of grassroots support, and organizing in our community around the issues that matter. That is how we became the grassroots fundraising front-runners in this race -- and that is how we’ll win in November.

Your support is critical to ensuring that we win, friend.

Monthly recurring donations are the driving force behind our successful fundraising haul this quarter, and they make budgeting for the digital tools and campaign expansion we need much easier. We know we’re in a strong position to win. Help us make that position even stronger by considering a monthly recurring donation to our campaign.

Setup a monthly donation ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.09_spk_b1_all&amount=25&recurring=true

Look, what we’re up against isn’t exactly a secret.

We’re running against Troy Nehls, a race-baiting sheriff who believes that wearing masks is un-American, and Kathaleen Wall, a GOP mega donor who has poured over $14 million into her own extremist campaign.

These “leaders” are running as far to the right as possible because they’re not interested in looking out for our community as much as they’re interested in getting media attention and corporate money -- and they’re failing at getting both.

It’s no wonder that everyday, hardworking families in our district are flocking to our campaign. We’re building a movement focused on our strong TX-22 community -- and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you by my side as we fight for the change we deserve.

If it’s within your means, keep up that fight by chipping in monthly to our campaign. Together, we can win.

Setup a monthly donation ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.09_spk_b1_all&amount=25&recurring=true

Thank you,
--Sri

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.09_spk_b1_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6652766e-20c2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0/235a582c-26c2-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzVhNTgyYy0yNmMyLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bu1szHtTFSTHaEwyb5icYl_8O3A2Ff1EyBxDC0cLCyY=&id=117373579 .

name: MJ Hegar
subject: We're counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need to expand our ad buy to reach even more undecided voters -- can we count on your help?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890158/7f51f7bc/413b319c/4ef60bee/3762353756/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter!

My Communications Team told me that they're looking to expand their TV ad buy to reach even more undecided voters! We're so close to hitting our goal of $15,000 -- just **$4,352** left and we'll be able to reach thousands more people!

**[Can you help us out before the midnight wiring deadline?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890158/7f51f7bc/413b319c/4ef60bed/3762353756/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200709.2nd__1681__&amount=10")**

With 34% of Texans undecided on who they'll support in November, I'm counting on this grassroots team to pull together and help me get the message out there. Ad buys like this one are going to be _critical_ to winning against Sen. Cornyn -- **[so if you can, pitch in to expand our reach and let's win this thing!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890158/7f51f7bc/413b319c/4ef60bed/3762353756/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200709.2nd__1681__&amount=10")**

Thanks for being in this fight, Peter! \-- MJ
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890158/7f51f7bc/413b319c/4ef60bed/3762353756/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200709.2nd__1681__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890158/7f51f7bc/413b319c/4ef60bec/3762353756/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2ODEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1681&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890158/7f51f7bc/413b319c/4ef60be3/3762353756/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

body:

subject: The problem with COVID-19 testing...

body:
... is that we're not doing enough of it.

If we're going to slow the spread of COVID-19, we need to make testing readily accessible and widely available -- exactly the opposite of what the Trump Administration is doing by cutting funding for public testing sites.

Will you stand with me by demanding the Trump Administration resume funding for COVID-19 so Americans can know whether or not they're infected?

President Trump is afraid that the higher the number of reported COVID-19 cases, the worse he looks. The consequences of not testing, however, are far more severe.

Join me in telling President Trump that COVID-19 testing is a public health concern, not a campaign talking point | SIGN YOUR NAME >>

Thank you,

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: The tools to reopen safely
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb’s team is also getting critical PPE to schools across the state – just in time to safely reopen schools for a new year. | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

Businesses across Indiana are reopening, with more Hoosiers getting back to work.

It’s definitely a welcome sign – but as we’re getting out, it’s __**critical**__ that we’re being safe. To limit the spread of COVID-19, the CDC recommends wearing a cloth face covering to protect your fellow Hoosiers.

**_Yesterday, we received an update on how Governor Holcomb and his team are leading the way when it comes to providing Hoosier frontline workers, businesses and schools with the resources we need to mask up!_**

In fact, the state has already worked with Indiana manufacturers and suppliers from across the state to supply _**over 26 million pieces of PPE**_ – including masks, disinfectant, gloves, hand sanitizer and more.

_**PPE for Schools**_

Governor Holcomb’s team is also getting critical PPE to schools across the state – just in time to safely reopen schools for a new year. **_They have more than 3 million reusable masks available for students!_**

This program is available to all schools, and as of yesterday, 472 Indiana school corporations are participating.

In addition to a reusable mask for Hoosier students, here’s what else schools will receive:
|
---
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2d2ec397979648688f56a37d869a2cff&_e=gX79pQsrivQkcGZNX-l30-mDEjtP1myEBwRWY5csjjlh0lNUO3pFwSIrnWymg2sbaMLw5KFc_UY52nxlKDNkuGRhJmP-tPd-DDoV6vfzuwb5il-SDf1RBY0w8A7iNiFfH7REkY5SOzD8kFaYsZ-Fc35I30OUiKno1lt4s9JLZSjnED7-4Z20qwpc_olSVCXqTfRDtOApsX-Zo1YhZNkYK7qq-ExuFsQY_1CVC7XklfR8PuP77uxns12X8E1zawODFok_HbT7uEMdB1C_cSscdxpHPnSU6ZOdn98c9fBUyTyGqOQlEXagS4k8A2IShW_Tk9ue1DrlF313qphjEamIU0RKFYK-cjz6L4HtKJ4Lkbyk9ZzEipHQe5UpwQlnPMPBSGYllh8LvxBXSr7fzOmisOHExqwqGFYddSz_mcKSLOIHUdYTJZBT_uJjOjLL65cP)
|
---
**_PPE for Businesses_**

As the Back on Track plan launched, so did the Indiana Small Business PPE Marketplace. Since May, it’s filled more than 30,000 orders to over 600 cities across Indiana, protecting thousands of Hoosiers on the job at our state’s small businesses!

And now that requests are shifting, the state is launching the Indiana PPE Directory, which is directly connecting Hoosiers with our local businesses that manufacture or distribute PPE. **[You can check it out here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2d2ec397979648688f56a37d869a2cff&_e=gX79pQsrivQkcGZNX-l30-mDEjtP1myEBwRWY5csjjkpq1W7zFxO1g25nxVBV-wtLlYOiBnJOMgGIm3OGJkSKflY3DOUrkrFR0fs0fbbqNCDQkN5Zj7LwAztiQH-4kHSZb73bvM0ZzkuFDeS5WxUYEP7T27VyzfyHnJAjD2DTAZ7vQRn-3CP53odJ5BCzr8ueivIS6orcNfkbTTV97gVSJTpA2RuDyQx5G76agVUogjQ2A-tjpSbNso5JHTeEUQRawrRbHKylYfUMOgrVg-puf3WxSCf1rEld0QoAfoTJnPYLT3bg732-_70BlUKrPhCDNMx2Jn-PZ9TYNztsHTa3b_qtJq_bLa04igYNr7-UW7omqTmsH56YsMiTM56MxZIz-72c6NMmZz58FM2gM8k9UcdHJk3grNcOj67ktP54XbaF_3F9FW3X7ok-be2exZAwPLtwYfT0Z7Wmi2gTOAgtw%3D%3D)**

We have so much to be thankful for here in Indiana, and that includes Governor Holcomb’s leadership as we continue to navigate this pandemic.

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: Joe Biden
subject: Will you endorse my plan to Buy American and build back better, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I just announced my plan to build an inclusive economy. |
---
Peter, make no mistake: America has been knocked down.

The unemployment rate is higher than it was in the Great Recession. Millions have lost jobs, hours, pay, health care, or the small business they started, through no fault of their own.

Even before COVID, Donald Trump's economic policies rewarded excessive wealth over hard work, economic concentration over workers' rights, and provided too little help for so many Americans struggling to make ends meet. And, women, Black, Latino, and Native individuals, and immigrants have _never_ been welcomed as full participants in the economy.

**But here 's what I know: There's no greater economic engine in the world than the hard work and ingenuity of the American people.**

So when I say this is no time to just build back to the way things were before, I really mean it. We have to _build back better_. That's why I just announced my plan to build an inclusive economy where every American enjoys a fair return for their work and an equal chance to get ahead. That starts with ensuring that the future is made in _all of America by all of America 's workers._

And, in the coming weeks, I'll share more on the other parts of my plan, including how we will build a clean energy economy and a caring economy.

[Peter, if you agree that we need a comprehensive manufacturing and innovation strategy that will not just bring back the jobs lost due to COVID-19 and Trump's incompetence, but will create millions of new jobs, will you endorse my plan today as a citizen co-sponsor?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c0030/2808550093/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/economy-plan-petition?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.09_B2_econplan_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.09_B2_econplan_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | [ENDORSE THE PLAN TO BUY AMERICAN](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c0030/2808550093/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/economy-plan-petition?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.09_B2_econplan_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.09_B2_econplan_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Peter, here are just a few ways my plan will create high-quality, high-skill, manufacturing and innovation jobs, with a chance to join a union:
* **Buy American:** I start with a pretty basic idea -- when we spend taxpayer money, we should buy American products and support American jobs. I'll strengthen our commitment to Buy American by closing loopholes and cracking down on waivers. I'll make a $400 billion investment to power new demand for American products, materials, and services.

* **Make It In America:** I'll retool and revitalize American manufacturing, especially smaller manufacturers and those owned by women and people of color, by enacting manufacturing tax credit, quadrupling support for the Manufacturing Extension Partnership, and creating a Treasury Department credit.

* **Innovate in America:** I'll make a historic, $300 billion investment in R&D, which could help create 3 million jobs in communities across the country. This investment across all 50 states will unleash high-quality job creation in urban and rural communities, with historic investments in communities of color.

And this is just the start. I'll increase the minimum wage to $15 an hour, reverse Trump's tax and trade policies that drove manufacturing into a recession, bring back supply chains for critical equipment, and more. And racial equity will be a defining priority, powering the economy through small business, and ensuring young people have a fair shot.

But, Peter, we can only make this plan a reality if we fight for it, together. We need to show just how many people are ready to invest in America's manufacturing and innovation again.

[If you're with me, will you add your name as an endorser and an official citizen co-sponsor of my plan today?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c0030/2808550093/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/economy-plan-petition?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.09_B2_econplan_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.09_B2_econplan_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
[ENDORSE THE PLAN TO BUY AMERICAN](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c0030/2808550093/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/economy-plan-petition?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.09_B2_econplan_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.07.09_B2_econplan_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Thank you,

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c002f/2808550093/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c002e/2808550093/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c002d/2808550093/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c002c/2808550093/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

[**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c002b/2808550093/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c002a/2808550093/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c0029/2808550093/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c0028/2808550093/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c0027/2808550093/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c0029/2808550093/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf24/1cd0ac28/89d5cc38/357c0024/2808550093/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

clean_body: I just announced my plan to build an inclusive economy. | Peter, make no mistake: America has been knocked down. The unemployment rate is higher than it was in the Great Recession. Millions have lost jobs, hours, pay, health care, or the small business they started, through no fault of their own. Even before COVID, Donald Trump's economic policies rewarded excessive wealth over hard work, economic concentration over workers' rights, and provided too little help for so many Americans struggling to make ends meet. And, women, Black, Latino, and Native individuals, and immigrants have never been welcomed as full participants in the economy. But here 's what I know: There's no greater economic engine in the world than the hard work and ingenuity of the American people. So when I say this is no time to just build back to the way things were before, I really mean it. We have to build back better. That's why I just announced my plan to build an inclusive economy where every American enjoys a fair return for their work and an equal chance to get ahead. name: Claudia Tenney
subject: We did it once. Let’s do it again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Anthony Brindisi has been undoing that progress since the day he arrived in Washington, and that’s why I say it’s time to make NY-22 great again [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=44adfc4c33934aea9ad92fbd0ad377d5&_e=Kc8dTvW-9TvoJVIG4CC3Jj4FksKH4LOYvnaJ6B6cNgz53Ia2FDqUeLsafQZbT551uLmLpvCLbgsEqJr868cebAvCRJzoo7Yl1mzmTB3_ViRwijia30GNVyeytGEaCJjSkRPaEd61IpAxaly2kiFkgH7jOGL2UOcVRQkqWXwRxAKdbLWaFV0xWwI-9jJs024zNN5U8rnEN6myvl7J9o2HlGabG9TjCbF0XLNaCVdHrNeDcnENSQO3DmdYtS-maZ80zAk4KdUSlkzq3U_NZ-HVKyWdYQphEnqGlO-Yea1Yv3_hV8qiGlSM3aaY_fzQKpsTc7ug0ARQaZl2Ygpp4vUw271NqfrTlQom8_TKjYvZrYK2PTJlAcjIq_jj1aI-dnfWpAcFEEDp0PvB9h1U7S39obTBGwyOpDN7mIOrbvbQoQUTwuUorTkiWIJJdNvra5EtR3-9IC2GCShtvf8DM5qqtsUPV928CL0AL8sbootAtLQ%3D) [**LET’S MAKE NY-22 GREAT AGAIN >>>**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=44adfc4c33934aea9ad92fbd0ad377d5&_e=Kc8dTvW-9TvoJVIG4CC3Jj4FksKH4LOYvnaJ6B6cNgz53Ia2FDqUeLsafQZbT551uLmLpvCLbgsEqJr868cebAvCRJzoo7Yl1mzmTB3_ViRwijia30GNVyeytGEaCJjSkRPaEd61IpAxaly2kiFkgH7jOGL2UOcVRQkqWXwRxAKdbLWaFV0xWwI-9jJs024zNN5U8rnEN6myvl7J9o2HlGabG9TjCbF0XLNaCVdHrNeDcnENSQO3DmdYtS-maZ80zAk4KdUSlkzq3U_NZ-HVKyGTtpIG6eumM1tQcQXpQL5dW1hUlF3Am5Hv13EUAqjED-jBB6aUeT-XaUEFt7tCEG4cxF9L6DqTk2gpsog4UmEGja2JEC36us0zTcmJGFLDlEzXruOpFr-LmeUzlxlER5y_tZvBSD-2dT2SyOe4AKGeo9FfsXC-xqwwZSEGtQDvHH-VHrdR50sEqTd3RVWGbHJhokzmA4i1fGgI04oZ6kg%3D) Friend, Our district knows all too well what it’s like to be lied to by career politicians who overpromise and underdeliver.
Politicians in both Albany and Washington have promised to prioritize our Upstate communities for decades – just for them to forget their promise once they get to office.
When we took over NY-22 back in 2016, I made it my personal goal to lead our businesses, schools, and the rural communities they support with honesty and transparency.
That leadership transformed our district – all because we worked together to support local manufacturing again, prioritize the needs of our veterans, and invest in our infrastructure.
**Anthony Brindisi has been undoing that progress since the day he arrived in Washington, and that’s why I say it’s time to make NY-22 great again this November._Are you with me?_** [**LET’S MAKE NY-22 GREAT AGAIN >>**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=44adfc4c33934aea9ad92fbd0ad377d5&_e=Kc8dTvW-9TvoJVIG4CC3Jj4FksKH4LOYvnaJ6B6cNgz53Ia2FDqUeLsafQZbT551uLmLpvCLbgsEqJr868cebAvCRJzoo7Yl1mzmTB3_ViRwijia30GNVyeytGEaCJjSkRPaEd61IpAxaly2kiFkgH7jOGL2UOcVRQkqWXwRxAKdbLWaFV0xWwI-9jJs024zNN5U8rnEN6myvl7J9o2HlGabG9TjCbF0XLNaCVdHrNeDcnENSQO3DmdYtS-maZ80zAk4KdUSlkzq3U_NZ-HVK-WTrKGPBPktE75__Go89HtOPRKmw5s7SBHwL-me-XkPU7qDy0327t9L9ZhsmcONb4Kp2Y7ZusnS57F22agbwHI2d_xaBk1SAo65gLSr24_kLRK8-Aai_l12igOuN0msKxasxi9JNt9mC5BQYX8_I10kxevANreAIt4IqctweEMv4JH9bBI0drHygDdCXNu7N-RiBMwwazIqtklhIsFcYYE%3D) Thanks to Anthony Brindisi, the keys to our district are now in Nancy Pelosi’s hands – and she has ZERO interest in serving the needs of our communities which are now being forgotten again.
It’s on people like you and me to turn this around, by taking back our district, taking back the House, and focusing on what matters again – the needs of our local communities.
Friend, together, we made our district great once, and I have no doubt that we can do it again, but I need to know that you’re with me as we have less than **four months until Election Day.** [**RUSH IN $22 TO MAKE NY-22 GREAT AGAIN**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=44adfc4c33934aea9ad92fbd0ad377d5&_e=Kc8dTvW-9TvoJVIG4CC3Jj4FksKH4LOYvnaJ6B6cNgz53Ia2FDqUeLsafQZbT551uLmLpvCLbgsEqJr868cebE_sY9orb-6-tm5aHXKAfIbHGc0m8msAFXsb_vOuyAGQDxqG9EwTyFk-9NgAMuZQaBg-0IzgWmLnqr43s6Y2ZhVGKVkJZ2xBHL-7iqYbdlSZObFW9L7QlFbk4oegA4zd5CpTuL3-7nuxm2-vCHAA6qsUklpclJLW8445ibnkzteXxZgLNEqRhoi5uJzYeiF2JILQ9HqsKZBV6aJFw2jCt3x64kKdiqK4JsmOQjMR1Tm19bQDI9BLa1ll1WHLaixHSPm3U2IC3CeF3Nnexnky5eFe81X0Je4uMp1l6JdrZSHB8Fbhkg3ZKFWKhkGz53mhtGxMLAs67-oTVnzFpaYkOVgDude5Wc8LXM-6vbkZNBjG0l4w9opy2my7-x5_yevT8HzOJH_PfkyscBDz9w3Xfb4%3D) **Let’s do this!**
Thank you, Claudia Tenney |

| PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323 |

By clicking “Donate Now" I certify that the following statements are true and accurate: I am at least 18 years old, this contribution is made from my personal credit or debit card with my own personal funds and is not made from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organization, national bank, or entity or person that is a federal contractor, and I will not be reimbursed for this contribution by another person. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Join me and Beto for a digital conversation on the path forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have plenty of stories to share -- you won't want to miss this.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, Next week, I'll join Beto O'Rourke for a conversation about where America is going and what we can do together to strengthen it. Beto has worked tirelessly to turn Texas blue, to build a grassroots movement to win the toughest fights up and down the ballot, and to end gerrymandering to strengthen our democracy. He's a champion for gun safety and for progressive immigration reform. Between all of that and our mutual love for basketball, there's so much to discuss -- I hope you'll join us. **[Make a donation of $15, or whatever feels right to you, to join Beto O'Rourke and me for a conversation on Zoom next Wednesday, July 15th, at 5:30 p.m. PT / 8:30 p.m. ET.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9545?t=5&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$15 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9625?t=6&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)
---
| | [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9546?t=7&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)
---
| [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9547?t=8&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)
---
| | [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9548?t=9&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)
---
| [$250 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9626?t=10&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9545?t=11&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)
---
My conversation with Paul Simon last night was so energizing, and that's one of the reasons I'm excited to spend some time with Beto, too -- we're all missing human connections and opportunities to catch up and talk about what matters, and I'm sure next week's conversation will be just as exciting.
Beto's been committed to speaking up for racial justice, environmental activism, and more -- and having both been on the national stage this year speaking out about Donald Trump, I'm sure we'll have stories to share.
**[You won't want to miss this conversation: Just donate $15, or whatever you're comfortable with, and you'll be eligible to join us on July 15th.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9545?t=12&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9545?t=13&akid=8094%2E868730%2EboOtsj)
---

PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Supporting one another
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This pandemic has impacted every community in Rhode Island and across the world. Unfortunately, the communities hit hardest have been those who can least afford it, and that includes our undocumented neighbors. Many of these Rhode Islanders have been working as essential workers throughout the crisis but are ineligible for federal public assistance due to their immigration status. It's not right, and we are doing something about it.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014V7CfmxI1Lt1WWJb-x24aZPSG0Hd_t1gnzyJeupsr6Li29lx3ORCxuvqrm_Jm3f6wXxrpSEJH4vIiMZ4sgyokZaYXO36erAIl-rQYVwm4t2RT0RNZOstZDo1aMWPvRFR1jsMz9PTBugwwy0TvMHMS240nu0WLpP7aBsHN82mZ7g=&c=PbvrZvIWZOw7IJYK3sRmaMn5Ejp5kE_bVd0xbST0yDtqoAyQD_xlnQ==&ch=iF5HoFRmmSG9iTssM6himg7tnCfIuWAKAopdxoH7cGMOEKmywkoZeQ==)
---
| Last month, I announced the weR1 Rhode Island Fund, which will provide thousands of families in need with $400 no-fee debit cards. Tomorrow morning at 9 a.m., I'll be hosting a virtual press conference on my [Facebook page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014V7CfmxI1Lt1WWJb-x24aZPSG0Hd_t1gnzyJeupsr6Li29lx3ORCxiLC-5JgvfUX7Dtf2FxcSj9e6WpXPdbJ_wpwNe4Rv-f4DgxYomry_f8QOa4rCxh6cmlNJIBsVj1kN2V0NosROKox4LvmpET5Pzlc6vZwGDBG&c=PbvrZvIWZOw7IJYK3sRmaMn5Ejp5kE_bVd0xbST0yDtqoAyQD_xlnQ==&ch=iF5HoFRmmSG9iTssM6himg7tnCfIuWAKAopdxoH7cGMOEKmywkoZeQ==) to discuss the progress we have made in just a few short weeks. I hope that you'll join us to learn about how well the program is going so far.
If you are in a position to make a donation of any size, please text weR1 to 27126 or use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014V7CfmxI1Lt1WWJb-x24aZPSG0Hd_t1gnzyJeupsr6Li29lx3ORCxuvqrm_Jm3f6wXxrpSEJH4vIiMZ4sgyokZaYXO36erAIl-rQYVwm4t2RT0RNZOstZDo1aMWPvRFR1jsMz9PTBugwwy0TvMHMS240nu0WLpP7aBsHN82mZ7g=&c=PbvrZvIWZOw7IJYK3sRmaMn5Ejp5kE_bVd0xbST0yDtqoAyQD_xlnQ==&ch=iF5HoFRmmSG9iTssM6himg7tnCfIuWAKAopdxoH7cGMOEKmywkoZeQ==). It only takes a few minutes to help support a Rhode Island family.
If you're someone who has already donated to this important cause: Thank you. Your support truly demonstrates that we are crushing COVID by helping our neighbors in need. I feel so proud to be a Rhode Islander and you should too.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014V7CfmxI1Lt1WWJb-x24aZPSG0Hd_t1gnzyJeupsr6Li29lx3ORCxjsUCGYHMv5mfeT-MpEs8YA2BEpEh3mjauV43vTUhJ5JJvK_HOHEurat3kIb5lesBMFM9H6a0TQg1G2rZP7ssX_6Biyu8Y93Xzphstclu9pjD-AGMC_2H1OLBS0CUyv-u4T_o9NzzjDBcCFGJla9sag=&c=PbvrZvIWZOw7IJYK3sRmaMn5Ejp5kE_bVd0xbST0yDtqoAyQD_xlnQ==&ch=iF5HoFRmmSG9iTssM6himg7tnCfIuWAKAopdxoH7cGMOEKmywkoZeQ==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014V7CfmxI1Lt1WWJb-x24aZPSG0Hd_t1gnzyJeupsr6Li29lx3ORCxjsUCGYHMv5mfeT-MpEs8YA2BEpEh3mjauV43vTUhJ5JJvK_HOHEurat3kIb5lesBMFM9H6a0TQg1G2rZP7ssX_6Biyu8Y93Xzphstclu9pjD-AGMC_2H1OLBS0CUyv-u4T_o9NzzjDBcCFGJla9sag=&c=PbvrZvIWZOw7IJYK3sRmaMn5Ejp5kE_bVd0xbST0yDtqoAyQD_xlnQ==&ch=iF5HoFRmmSG9iTssM6himg7tnCfIuWAKAopdxoH7cGMOEKmywkoZeQ==).
---
| COVID has impacted Rhode Islanders in countless ways- families have watched their loved ones fight to recover from the disease; thousands have lost jobs; students have missed their teachers and friends. But COVID has also brought out the best in many of us, and the way we have come together to contribute to weR1 is a perfect example.
I hope you'll consider donating by texting weR1 to 27126 or using [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014V7CfmxI1Lt1WWJb-x24aZPSG0Hd_t1gnzyJeupsr6Li29lx3ORCxuvqrm_Jm3f6wXxrpSEJH4vIiMZ4sgyokZaYXO36erAIl-rQYVwm4t2RT0RNZOstZDo1aMWPvRFR1jsMz9PTBugwwy0TvMHMS240nu0WLpP7aBsHN82mZ7g=&c=PbvrZvIWZOw7IJYK3sRmaMn5Ejp5kE_bVd0xbST0yDtqoAyQD_xlnQ==&ch=iF5HoFRmmSG9iTssM6himg7tnCfIuWAKAopdxoH7cGMOEKmywkoZeQ==).
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014V7CfmxI1Lt1WWJb-x24aZPSG0Hd_t1gnzyJeupsr6Li29lx3ORCxuvqrm_Jm3f6wZ61ysVHvMBsHtG8Ahd-vhQdbq8CLHB7CxEzN063HNp-L6cQYRME89kOYcq5lZ399Xlsi3E4pUiI1eRrP6YM_wCr8d1AL5S-1vgPz2sia-b4wMOugbj7ZvvWHh5NYl1uFLrYYiHbIUjRLcZTx6ikOIsRwyxPjRRnCwtXz-P5FmbrQg-suKswuIEmM7-s0LZyZOVoC6wSxonZvjYdNqcZ9-gCZlT5-bIoyn_XZjN48cFBxVtpqAU90SGQeyJIibj6oTNIQlla5bUGoJdKvvNygOidoZeb0w6ux1vChq8rCv1LzuCF3JROuxi_nQqHWX655XGlMh2_kGzYVVDMsG2djG0mL0vPHwuhn8LnIcSiSojwYhRQREZ_qqUQ_sD4HP_T&c=PbvrZvIWZOw7IJYK3sRmaMn5Ejp5kE_bVd0xbST0yDtqoAyQD_xlnQ==&ch=iF5HoFRmmSG9iTssM6himg7tnCfIuWAKAopdxoH7cGMOEKmywkoZeQ==).
---

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, This pandemic has impacted every community in Rhode Island and across the world. Unfortunately, the communities hit hardest have been those who can least afford it, and that includes our undocumented neighbors. Many of these Rhode Islanders have been working as essential workers throughout the crisis but are ineligible for federal public assistance due to their immigration status. It's not right, and we are doing something about it. | == | Last month, I announced the weR1 Rhode Island Fund, which will provide thousands of families in need with $400 no-fee debit cards. Tomorrow morning at 9 a.m., I'll be hosting a virtual press conference on my == to discuss the progress we have made in just a few short weeks. I hope that you'll join us to learn about how well the program is going so far. If you are in a position to make a donation of any size, please text weR1 to 27126 or use ==. It only takes a few minutes to help support a Rhode Island family. If you're someone who has already donated to this important cause: Thank you. Your support truly demonstrates that we are crushing COVID by helping our neighbors in need. I feel so proud to be a Rhode Islander and you should too. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | COVID has impacted Rhode Islanders in countless ways- families have watched their loved ones fight to recover from the disease; thousands have lost jobs; students have missed their teachers and friends. But COVID has also brought out the best in many of us, and the way we have come together to contribute to weR1 is a perfect example. I hope you'll consider donating by texting weR1 to 27126 or using ==. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

body:

| | |

| Peter,

When peaceful protests were replaced by lawless violence, **Colin Allred was silent**. When cities moved to defund police departments, Colin Allred was silent. **Silence isn't leadership** , and **the people of North Texas deserve leadership** and somebody who will stand up for them in Congress.

I'm running for Congress to fill the **massive leadership void left by Colin Allred** and bring Texas values back to Washington, D.C.

If you haven't yet seen our video that's been playing across social media and the web, check it out below!

**If we win Florida, we beat Trump. That 's why we need your help. We've selected you to take our official Biden vs. Trump Flip Florida Strategy Survey. [Click here to share your opinion ->](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/s/flip-florida-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+share+your+opinion+if+cons&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200709_1_1&source=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200709_1_1&refcode=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200709_1_1")**
[Take our official survey](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/s/flip-florida-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+Take+our+official+survey&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200709_1_1&source=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200709_1_1&refcode=DWS_EM_SV_IA_200709_1_1")

* * *

Biden is **SURGING** in Florida, but we can't afford to let up for even one second when the alternative is four more years of Trump's deadly incompetence.

That's why we're reaching out to plugged-in Democrats like you to get your opinion on what it's going to take to win Florida.

Debbie

name: news@pattymurray.com
subject: "Republicans' Senate majority is in serious danger"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
According to the latest edition of POLITICO's Election Forecast, **" President Donald Trump is now an underdog to win a second term, and Republicans' Senate majority is in serious danger of being swept out with him."**
This is welcome news for Democrats, but there is far too much on the line for us to be complacent. That's why Patty Murray's Sprint to 2020 program is so important -- because it's absolutely critical we all do our part to help our Democratic candidates win in November.
**[Will you pitch in $5 now to support Mark Kelly in Arizona, Theresa Greenfield in Iowa, and Barbara Bollier in Kansas to help Democrats flip the Senate?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200708-senateslate?refcode=em200708i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
POLITICO's report makes it clear: Republicans are losing their advantage when it comes to keeping a hold of their Senate majority and **" Democrats have both built leads in states that were previously considered up-for-grabs and put new states firmly on the map, expanding their path to a majority and potential unified control of government in 2021."**
As the article notes, it could be **" a potentially disastrous November for Republicans up and down the ballot"** \-- but we need to use that as motivation to work harder than ever to take advantage of the opportunity we've got. We have to remain focused on our goals and continue fighting as hard as we can for Democratic Senate candidates across the country.
**[Electing candidates like Mark Kelly, Theresa Greenfield, and Barbara Bollier is the key to winning a Democratic Senate. Contribute $5 to their campaigns to join the fight.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200708-senateslate?refcode=em200708i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Patty

name: Team Christy
subject: Printers and pens are out, phones and Zoom are in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baea/29776869/9f1b6df/569ee24b/302839904/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")
---

| | Hi Peter --

We've got some good news for you.

While the pandemic may have changed how we talk to voters in CA-25, it hasn't slowed down our efforts. **In fact, we're about to get a major boost in our field support.**

Thanks to our strong end-of-quarter fundraiser, Sarah Fellman has joined to help our field efforts and was able to hit the ground running.

Field is one of the most expensive parts of a campaign -- _and_ it's become even more critical to our success since we can't do the sort of casual, in-person events that allow Christy to talk to lots of voters at once.

Sarah is in the middle of building out a field program equal to the task, but we need your help.

**[Can you pitch in $5 or more to help ramp up our new field program so we can talk to more voters in CA-25?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baea/29776869/9f1b6df/569ee244/302839904/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDlfZmllbGRzdXBwb3J0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200709_fieldsupport-full")**
[$5 sends 50 text messages](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baea/29776869/9f1b6df/569ee245/302839904/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDlfZmllbGRzdXBwb3J0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200709_fieldsupport-full&amount=5") [$15 pays for video-conferencing tools](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baea/29776869/9f1b6df/569ee246/302839904/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDlfZmllbGRzdXBwb3J0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200709_fieldsupport-full&amount=15") [$45 pays for a staffer's phone bill](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baea/29776869/9f1b6df/569ee247/302839904/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDlfZmllbGRzdXBwb3J0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200709_fieldsupport-full&amount=45") [$100 buys digital ads to reach 1,000 voters](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baea/29776869/9f1b6df/569ee240/302839904/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDlfZmllbGRzdXBwb3J0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200709_fieldsupport-full&amount=100") Normally, we'd be spending money on printer ink, pens, and pizza but, clearly, this is not a normal time.

That's why we're transferring our funding to building up a completely virtual field program: training organizers online, providing cell phones for our dedicated volunteers who need them, and using texting tools to reach as many voters as possible.

This is new and challenging territory. But we're no strangers to hard work.

The only way we can continue to get the word out about Christy is through these new campaigning methods.

**[Pitch in $5 or more to fund our new field operations and get Christy to Congress.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baea/29776869/9f1b6df/569ee244/302839904/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDlfZmllbGRzdXBwb3J0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200709_fieldsupport-full")**

Thank you and stay safe.

Team Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baea/29776869/9f1b6df/569ee244/302839904/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDlfZmllbGRzdXBwb3J0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200709_fieldsupport-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6baea/29776869/9f1b6df/569ee244/302839904/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MDlfZmllbGRzdXBwb3J0LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2007_email_christy?refcode=em20_200709_fieldsupport-full")

name: Team Warner
subject: casting your ballot this fall 🗳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
Derek --

Election Day is 117 days away, but as we face a global pandemic and see long lines for primary elections across the country, **it 's time to start thinking about how you'll cast your ballot.**

Our team is working hard to make sure that every Virginian is able to safely cast their ballot -- no one should have to choose between their health and exercising their right to vote. For some, that might mean voting by mail, and for others, that might mean voting in person early or on Election Day. We're committed to making sure that folks know their options and are able to cast their ballots with confidence.

Mark Warner's doing his part in the Senate by supporting the _Natural Disaster and Emergency Ballot Act_ and the _VoteSafe Act_ to expand early voting and vote-by-mail to ensure that folks across the country have the kind of expanded voting options that we now have in Virginia. He also joined Senate colleagues to urge the U.S. Treasury to provide assistance to the U.S. Postal Service -- a critical service for many Americans and an important part of making sure mail-in ballots reach folks.

We need help from you, too! **Here are three things you can do right now to protect ballot access and make sure you 're ready for Election Day.**
1. **Make sure you 're registered to vote and request your absentee ballot.** If you're a Virginia resident, you can do this on the **[VA Department of Elections website](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbfc/53d9897e/544f4fe1/1c884f98/4254287734/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation")** (and you can request an absentee ballot while you're at it)!

2. **[Become a citizen co-sponsor of the _VoteSafe Act_.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbfc/53d9897e/544f4fe1/1c884f87/4254287734/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-mailin")** Led by Sen. Kamala Harris, this bill would expand early voting and vote-by-mail access across the country, allowing folks to vote safely.

3. **Reach out to three friends** to start talking about their plan to vote this fall. We have four months until the election, but it's never too soon to make your plan!

**Bottom line:** Expanding our voting options doesn't take away anyone's right to cast their ballot in person if they choose. It adds options for those who may not feel safe or may not be able to visit their polling place by expanding early in-person voting and making voting by mail more accessible.

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner
Support our voter turnout efforts _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbfc/53d9897e/544f4fe1/1c884f86/4254287734/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-turnout?express_lane=true&refcode=20200709_p_1__643__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5") [DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbfc/53d9897e/544f4fe1/1c884f85/4254287734/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-turnout?express_lane=true&refcode=20200709_p_1__643__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10") [DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbfc/53d9897e/544f4fe1/1c884f84/4254287734/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-turnout?express_lane=true&refcode=20200709_p_1__643__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25") [DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbfc/53d9897e/544f4fe1/1c884f83/4254287734/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-turnout?express_lane=true&refcode=20200709_p_1__643__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50") [DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbfc/53d9897e/544f4fe1/1c884f82/4254287734/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-turnout?express_lane=true&refcode=20200709_p_1__643__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100") [CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbfc/53d9897e/544f4fe1/1c884f81/4254287734/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY0MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-turnout?refcode=20200709_p_1__643__&refcode2=express_lane_other")

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Sen. Cornyn and Texas leadership have failed to respond to the COVID-19 pandemic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texans are paying the price.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890125/7f51f7bc/413c3bfc/4ef60ef6/4290822417/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **Peter, when this pandemic began, Gov. Abbott and Sen. Cornyn dismissed the impacts of COVID-19.**

They went on TV and bragged about how Texas was responding to the crisis better than other states. Sen. Cornyn made jokes about Corona beer and said it would be "a piece of cake."

They didn't listen to the doctors, nurses, scientists, or public health officials who were telling us that this would be serious -- that we needed to move quickly to prevent the situation from getting much, much worse. **Now _we 're_ paying the price.**

**[If you agree that Texas deserves better than career politicians who ignore the advice of public health experts during a global public health crisis, will you pitch in to help me defeat Sen. Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890125/7f51f7bc/413c3bfc/4ef60ef5/4290822417/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200709.3nd__1679__&amount=10")**

Leaders like Gov. Abbott and Sen. Cornyn have failed Texans. They've failed our public health and failed our economy -- they're lagging on the extension of COVID-19 relief funds, even as millions of people are unemployed.

**It 's never been more urgent to replace Sen. Cornyn with someone who listens to doctors and nurses, who takes the advice of public health officials and scientists, and who will put the needs of Texans first.**

I'm fighting hard to defeat Sen. Cornyn this November, but I'm going to need your help to do it. **[Will you pitch in and help me ensure we've got a senator who will put Texans' lives and livelihoods first?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890125/7f51f7bc/413c3bfc/4ef60ef5/4290822417/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200709.3nd__1679__&amount=10")** \-- MJ
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890125/7f51f7bc/413c3bfc/4ef60ef5/4290822417/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200709.3nd__1679__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890125/7f51f7bc/413c3bfc/4ef60ef4/4290822417/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1679&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890125/7f51f7bc/413c3bfc/4ef60eeb/4290822417/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

It 's never been more urgent to replace Sen. Cornyn with someone who listens to doctors and nurses, who takes the advice of public health officials and scientists, and who will put the needs of Texans first. I'm fighting hard to defeat Sen. Cornyn this November, but I'm going to need your help to do it. "" \-- MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump expands Hispanic Prosperity Initiative
body:
President Trump just signed an executive order expanding the White House Hispanic Prosperity Initiative | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1508146103&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 9, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump expands Hispanic Prosperity Initiative**

**President Trump just signed** an executive order expanding the White House Hispanic Prosperity Initiative, which will help every member of our country’s proud Hispanic community prosper and achieve the American Dream.

**The order** will encourage pro-growth, pro-family, and pro-community policies such as school choice, personalized learning, family engagement, civic education, and more.

**“Hispanic Americans** are not only living the American Dream, but their incredible efforts are unlocking the American Dream for citizens all across our land,” President Trump says.

**🎬 _[Watch: How President Trump’s executive order benefits the Hispanic community](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=20e5c37613&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1281349470656106498")_**

**Hispanic-American workers** and families have thrived under President Trump’s agenda. Before the Coronavirus pandemic, the Hispanic unemployment rate reached a record low of 3.9 percent, and it remained under 5 percent for 23 consecutive months.

**In 2018** , the poverty rate for Hispanic Americans reached its lowest level on record, and since 2016, nearly 611,000 Hispanic Americans have been lifted out of poverty.

**As the Coronavirus** spread from China across the globe, President Trump worked tirelessly to ensure that all Americans could get back to work as quickly as possible. As a result, Hispanic employment increased by a sum of more than 2.1 million in May and June. This Administration won’t stop until every American is back on the job.

🎬 [President Trump: We will never let public charter schools be taken away!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f7646f674&e=3ee4985eea)

**And with today’s actions,** America will continue to be a land of opportunity for our incredible Hispanic community, as well as for every other American family.

**School choice** is a big part of that vision. Nearly one-third of all students in U.S. public charter schools are Hispanic. President Trump is expanding educational opportunities for these students and others, both with today’s executive order as well as through restoring local control and ending federal overreach in education more broadly.

**Community development** is another crucial component. Under President Trump, new jobs and investments have poured into nearly 9,000 designated “Opportunity Zones,” which together are home to more than 9 million Hispanic Americans.

[President Trump is lifting up and empowering Hispanic Americans!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0faa8c8461&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **WATCH** : [“We’re a believer in choice”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=545c15b31b&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|

---

---

Joe Biden HQ

**From:** Patrick Bonsignore, JoeBiden.com
**Date:** Sun, June 28, 2020
**Subject:** Peter, this email is an inside look at what's happening in the race for the presidency.
**To:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.09_B3_patrickbump_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.09_B3_patrickbump_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2")
Peter, it's Patrick, Joe Biden's Paid Media Director.

In this email, I'm going to break down some of the latest developments in the race and give you an inside look at what's happening on the airwaves in battleground states across the country.

[**But first, I would be remiss if I didn't ask for $5 from you towards our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal of the general election. Meeting this goal is vitally important to allow us to keep our ads on the air, and cement and expand our lead in the states that will decide the outcome of the race. Can you pitch in now?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.09_B3_patrickbump_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.09_B3_patrickbump_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2")

In just the past couple of weeks, we launched our first few ads of the general election! Here's a breakdown of our strategy:
**Messaging.** Our ads, unlike Donald Trump's ads, are positive. They reinforce that this campaign is not about one candidate, but rather about all of us. We directly tell voters that leadership means bringing people together and uniting the country, and that's what Joe Biden is all about.

**Targeting.** Our ads are currently running in Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, North Carolina, Florida, and Arizona. These are critically important states in our path to 270 Electoral Votes, and we're not taking a single vote for granted, which is why reaching as many voters in these states as possible is so important.
Peter, I know how critical it is that we keep our ads on the air at the strongest levels possible -- Trump and GOP Super PACs have been up with their own ads, oftentimes spreading downright lies about Vice President Biden's record.

So we need the funding to overcome their attacks, and boost our own positive, honest message to all the undecided voters we can. _And it's going to take a lot of resources._

Look, grassroots supporters like you make up 97% of our campaign's contributions, and those hard-earned dollars go straight to boosting our ad spending, so I'm really hoping that I can count on you for your first contribution to the campaign today.

**[Meeting our first end-of-quarter deadline goal of the general election will ensure that our advertising program has the resources it needs to be successful. So Peter, if you're in this fight 100% to elect Joe Biden and defeat Donald Trump, will you pitch in $5 right now?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.09_B3_patrickbump_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.09_B3_patrickbump_X__F1_S2_C2__ac_T2")**
