clean_body: Thanks to an incredible surge of grassroots donations, we've been able to launch three new ads | Peter, At the end of June, Patrick, our Paid Media Director, sent you an inside look at what we were planning for our first television ads of the general election. Since then, thanks to an incredible surge of grassroots donations, we've been able to launch three new ads in Pennsylvania and other battleground states across the country. But Peter, running ads everywhere we need to get Joe's message out is going to take a lot of resources. And since 97% of our campaign's contributions come from grassroots supporters, we're still counting on more supporters like you chipping in to keep our ads on the air in Pennsylvania. "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for being a part of this, Joe Biden HQ \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Patrick Bonsignore, JoeBiden.com Date: Sun, June 28, 2020 Subject: Peter, this email is an inside look at what's happening in the race for the presidency. To: "" Peter, it's Patrick, Joe Biden's Paid Media Director. In this email, I'm going to break down some of the latest developments in the race and give you an inside look at what's happening on the airwaves in battleground states across the country. "" | "" In just the past couple of weeks, we launched our first few ads of the general election! Here's a breakdown of our strategy: Messaging. Our ads, unlike Donald Trump's ads, are positive. They reinforce that this campaign is not about one candidate, but rather about all of us. We directly tell voters that leadership means bringing people together and uniting the country, and that's what Joe Biden is all about. Targeting. Our ads are currently running in Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, North Carolina, Florida, and Arizona. These are critically important states in our path to 270 Electoral Votes, and we're not taking a single vote for granted, which is why reaching as many voters in these states as possible is so important. Peter, I know how critical it is that we keep our ads on the air at the strongest levels possible -- Trump and GOP Super PACs have been up with their own ads, oftentimes spreading downright lies about Vice President Biden's record. So we need the funding to overcome their attacks, and boost our own positive, honest message to all the undecided voters we can. And it's going to take a lot of resources. Look, grassroots supporters like you make up 97% of our campaign's contributions, and those hard-earned dollars go straight to boosting our ad spending, so I'm really hoping that I can count on you for your first contribution to the campaign today. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you for everything you do to fund our work, Patrick Bonsignore Paid Media Director Biden for President | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" "" Donated to Biden for President? No, not yet! Suggested Action: "" | "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: dangerously short (need you now)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
---
| | Friend, I wouldn't email unless it were incredibly important, so believe me when I tell you:

**Kelly Loeffler 's shameful attacks on the Black Lives Matter movement are nothing more than an effort to sow division, keep Georgia's Senate seat red and protect Mitch McConnell's extremist majority.**
---
There's something happening in Georgia, and across the country. But both of my opponents - Sen. Loeffler and Rep. Collins - are extreme Republicans who are more concerned with their political future than the future of the next generation. What happens here in Georgia could decide which party controls the Senate, and with polls showing this race statistically tied, McConnell and the GOP have never been more vulnerable. But I need your help:
Loeffler is spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, and McConnell-linked dark money groups are flooding this race with millions more. This could ruin our chance to take back the Senate for Democrats unless we raise another $6,019 by midnight tonight - and with just hours to go, we're still falling dangerously short.
**Here's the thing: If everyone reading this email chipped in even just a few dollars now, we'd hit our goal in minutes. But I know not everyone will, so I'm personally asking if I can count on you, friend:[Please, can you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e507/288179be/80b4c70/348e6178/941199293/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzcxLWZyLW5kLXYxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk371-fr-nd-v1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for all that you do - I'm grateful for your support.

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e507/288179be/80b4c70/348e6179/941199293/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

body:
While there’s no doubt that this year’s state convention process looks a lot different, we’re excited to report that Hoosiers from every county have.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=32fa561be9)

| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=38116ee8ee&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Indiana Republicans,

While there’s no doubt that this year’s state convention process looks a lot different, we’re excited to report that Hoosiers from every county have made their voice heard.

With today’s 5 p.m. ET deadline for delegates to return their ballots, we’re excited to report that 98% of all ballots have been returned. That’s a higher number than the Democrats had for their convention this year!

Tomorrow, we’ll count the votes in presence of election watchers from all four campaigns. We’ll share the winner with you in a live video on Facebook tomorrow afternoon. We hope to have results around 1:30 p.m. ET, but it could be earlier or sooner depending on how long counting takes. We'll send out an email update before we go live with the results.
[\--> Like us on Facebook so you don't miss the event <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5cd850991b&e=1acd9bb3d6)

[\--> Click here to ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=41c8cc76d2&e=1acd9bb3d6)[go to our Facebook live page <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8eacef481b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Thank you to every delegate who made your voices heard! Tomorrow, we'll have the results!

Thanks,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

---
